title: The Veil's Embrace
body:
**Serpent Choir — The Veil's Embrace**
*Tier: high-stakes | Expires: TBD | Reward: 500 EC + 1 Kharma + 3 LP*

A relic believed to hold divine power has gone missing from the Sanctum Quarter. The High Apostle Yzura seeks a trusted operative to infiltrate the Iron Fang Consortium and retrieve the artifact before it falls into unscrupulous hands.

Contact: High Apostle Yzura, Serpent Choir Headquarters in the Sanctum Quarter.

title: The Disappearing Messenger
body:
**Wardens of Ash — The Disappearing Messenger**
*Tier: local | Expires: TBD | Reward: 50 EC + Bonus Kharma*

A courier working for the Wardens of Ash has gone missing in the Outer Wall district, and they need a reliable adventurer to find out what happened. The last known location was near the Warden's barracks. Contact Captain Havel Korin at the Grand Forum for further instructions.

title: Shattered Throne
body:
**Argent Blades — Shattered Throne**
*Tier: local | Expires: TBD | Reward: 120 EC + 5 Kharma*

A sealed crypt beneath the Outer Wall is rumored to contain ancient artifacts of unmatched glory. Prove your worth by uncovering its secrets and securing these relics for Lady Cerys Valemont.

*Contact: Argent Blades Recruiter, Grand Forum*

title: Iron Fang Consortium - The Echoes of Shattered Time
body:
**Iron Fang Consortium - The Echoes of Shattered Time**
*Tier: High-Stakes | Expires: TBD | Reward: 120 EC + 3 Kharma + 5 LP*

The Iron Fang Consortium seeks your aid in uncovering a long-lost artifact rumored to hold the power of a god. The ancient relic, known as the Clockwork Heart, is said to lie within the forgotten catacombs beneath the Outer Wall. Your task: retrieve the Heart before it falls into the wrong hands.

Contact: Zorick Kess, Grand Forum (in front of the FTA headquarters)

title: Shadows of the Beyond
body:
**Glass Sigil — Shadows of the Beyond**
*Tier: Local | Expires: Day 28 | Reward: 30 EC + 5 Kharma*

Contact: Senior Archivist Pell, Guild Spires

Eleanor Reed, your expertise in the arcane is well-known. A recent discovery within the Glass Sigil archives has piqued our interest. An ancient tome details a powerful ritual that could allow communication with the beyond - the very source of your Witchcraft School. The tome has been stolen, and its pages scattered throughout the Warrens. If retrieved whole, it may provide insights into your own heritage. Find and return the tome to Senior Archivist Pell at the Guild Spires. Your understanding of temporal insight could prove crucial in navigating this time-worn labyrinth.

title: The Rift of Shattered Glory
body:
**Argent Blades — The Rift of Shattered Glory**
*Tier: rift | Expires: TBD | Reward: 50 EC + 2 Kharma*

A growing Rift has emerged in the Sanctum Quarter, threatening to flood the district with its eldritch energies. The Argent Blades seek a group of brave adventurers to clear it before it causes further chaos. Speak with Lady Cerys Valemont at the Grand Forum for mission details and remuneration.

title: Iron Fang Consortium - Whispers from the Shadows
body:
**Iron Fang Consortium - Whispers from the Shadows**
*Tier: Local | Expires: TBD | Reward: 50 EC + 1 Legend Point*

An envoy with a divine soul is precisely what we need to uncover a traitor within our ranks. The Iron Fang Consortium has reason to believe that one of our operatives is leaking information to the Serpent Choir. We want Boxxo on this job.

Contact: Sylas Ironshield, Grand Forum, South District.

Sylas will provide you with specifics about the suspect and the location for your surveillance. Discretion is key—this must be handled delicately to avoid tipping off the traitor before we can apprehend them. Good luck, Boxxo.

title: The Missing Messenger
body:
**Iron Fang Consortium — The Missing Messenger**
*Tier: local | Expires: TBD | Reward: 50 EC + 1 Kharma*

A valuable delivery from the Iron Fang Consortium went missing in the Warrens district. The package was meant to reach Senior Archivist Pell at the Glass Sigil, and failure to deliver may compromise sensitive information. Retrieve the lost message and ensure its secure delivery.

Contact: Mari Fen, Adventurers Guild (Guild Spires)

title: Lost Lineage
body:
**Serpent Choir — Lost Lineage**
*Tier: local | Expires: 7 days | Reward: 10 EC + 20 Kharma*

Contact: High Apostle Yzura, Grand Forum

Ragard Gronhammer, your name has reached our ears. Rumors speak of a fellow dwarf claiming to be a descendant of the legendary Gronhammers, your lineage. We seek your aid in verifying this claim and uncovering the truth behind these rumors. Investigate the whereabouts of this individual and report back to me at the Grand Forum once your mission is complete. The fate of your lineage may hang in the balance.

title: The Chant of the Leaden Crown
body:
**Argent Blades — The Chant of the Leaden Crown**
*Tier: local | Expires: 7 days | Reward: 15 EC + 2 Kharma points*

Contact: Senior Archivist Pell, Glass Sigil Spire

Lammis, a warrior with a farmer's heart and the strength of a titan, we seek your aid. The Guild of Ashen Scrolls has unearthed an ancient prophecy that hints at the return of the Warrior of the Leaden Crown. We believe you may be the one foretold, and our records suggest a connection to your past. Travel to the Glass Sigil Spire and speak with Senior Archivist Pell regarding this matter. He will provide further details on how to unravel this divine thread that binds to your soul.

title: Feathers of Fate
reward: 50 EC + 1 feather of an Owlin (value 300 EC)
body:
**The Serpent Choir — Feathers of Fate**
*Tier: local | Expires: 7 days | Reward: 50 EC + 1 feather of an Owlin (value 300 EC)*

*Contact: High Apostle Yzura, Sanctum Quarter*

S'kree, your unique status as a Pipeline Owlin has been noticed by the Serpent Choir. They seek a rare and valuable feather of your kind to complete a divine contract. Prove yourself worthy of joining their ranks by securing a single feather from another Owlin, if one exists. Your contact is High Apostle Yzura in Sanctum Quarter. She can provide further details about this personal mission with city-wide implications. Your combat prowess and unique species make you the ideal candidate for this task.

title: Wardens of Ash - The Watchful Eyes
body:
**Wardens of Ash - The Watchful Eyes**
*Tier: Local | Expires: TBD | Reward: 50 EC + 2 Kharma*

Report to Captain Havel Korin at Grand Forum for a district sweep. Recent intelligence indicates that a group of miscreants have been spotted loitering near the Outer Wall. Your objective is to sweep the area, identify any signs of unlawful activity and apprehend anyone found breaking the city's peace.

title: Wardens of Ash - The Quiet Alley
body:
**Wardens of Ash - The Quiet Alley**
*Tier: local | Expires: TBD | Reward: 10 EC + Kharma (for reporting any findings)*

Following reports of unusual activity in the Sanctum Quarter, a quiet alley between Grand Forum and Guild Spires has caught our attention. The Wardens would appreciate an eye on the area for any signs of suspicious behavior or potential threats to the peace. Report back with your findings to Captain Havel Korin at the Watchtower in Sanctum Quarter.

title: The Shielded Archive
body:
**Guild of Ashen Scrolls — The Shielded Archive**
*Tier: Escort | Expires: TBD | Reward: 15 EC + 2 Kharma*

You are tasked with escorting an important researcher, Elder Pryn, through the dangerous Warrens to deliver him safely to the Grand Forum. The researcher has discovered a new method for stabilizing rifts and needs protection from those who would seek to steal or destroy his findings. Contact: Elder Pryn, Glass Sigil Spire.

title: Shattered Secrets of the Beyond
body:
**Wizards Tower — Shattered Secrets of the Beyond**
*Tier: Local | Expires: TBD | Reward: 30 EC + Potions of Healing (x4)*

Eleanor Reed, your unique mastery over arcane energy has not gone unnoticed. The Wizards Tower seeks your aid in unraveling an enigma that threatens the stability of our city's most sacred texts.

Contact: Senior Archivist Pell, Guild Spires

Objective: Investigate the strange occurrences plaguing the hallowed tomes within the Wizards Tower and restore their lost potency before they fall into enemy hands.

title: The Lore Thief's Trail
body:
**Guild of Ashen Scrolls — The Lore Thief's Trail**
*Tier: Investigation | Expires: TBD | Reward: 50 EC + 100 Kharma*

A renowned historian has vanished without a trace, leaving behind an incomplete manuscript that could rewrite the city's history. Investigate his last known whereabouts in the Grand Forum and uncover the truth behind his disappearance.

*Contact: Senior Archivist Pell, Guild Spires*

title: Rift's Pulse
body:
**Guild of Ashen Scrolls — Rift's Pulse**
*Tier: Local | Expires: TBD | Reward: 45 EC + 100 Kharma*

Eleanor Reed, esteemed Wizard, your unique arcane prowess and affinity for the beyond is sought by Senior Archivist Pell. A temporal anomaly has surfaced within the Grand Forum, causing time to warp unpredictably. Utilize your Ward of Stability and Temporal Insight to investigate the rift and pinpoint its source.

Contact: Senior Archivist Pell, Guild Spires (Grand Forum level 4)

title: The Shimmering Breach
body:
**Wardens of Ash — The Shimmering Breach**
*Tier: Rift | Expires: TBD | Reward: 200 EC + 100 Kharma*

A new Rift has opened in the heart of Grand Forum, threatening to flood the district with otherworldly horrors. The Wardens need experienced adventurers to seal it before it grows any larger.

*Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Sanctum Quarter*

title: The Escort of the Crimson Flame
body:
**Wardens of Ash — The Escort of the Crimson Flame**
*Tier: Patrol | Expires: TBD | Reward: 100 EC + 50 Kharma*

Guard a caravan carrying a rare artifact known as the Crimson Flame to the Grand Forum. The caravan is led by Captain Voren, found at the Outer Wall gate. Your task is to ensure their safe passage through The Warrens and into the heart of the city. The Crimson Flame is rumored to be an ancient relic with powerful protective properties. It's essential that it reaches its intended destination without incident.

title: The Hidden Vault of Avarus
body:
**Iron Fang Consortium — The Hidden Vault of Avarus**
*Tier: Rift | Expires: TBD | Reward: 100 EC + 100 Kharma*

Delve into the shattered remains of Avarus's Citadel, a fortress once guarding the city's wealth. The rift has exposed a sealed vault within, believed to contain relics of great power and value. Contact: Serrik Dhal, Market Infinite.

title: The Divine Intercession
body:
**Wardens of Ash — The Divine Intercession**
*Tier: Investigation | Expires: TBD | Reward: 50 EC + 100 Kharma*

In the heart of Grand Forum, Captain Havel Korin has a personal request for Boxxo. He believes an artifact of divine origin is being trafficked by the Iron Fang Consortium. Your unique abilities are needed to confirm and secure the relic before it falls into the wrong hands. Meet with Captain Havel at the Guard's Watch Tower, south of the Grand Forum entrance.

title: The Tower's Shadow
body:
**Wardens of Ash — The Tower's Shadow**
*Tier: Inter-guild | Expires: TBD | Reward: 200 EC + 150 Kharma*

The Tower Authority has requested our aid in a delicate matter. The Iron Fang Consortium is rumored to be smuggling relics through the Outer Wall, potentially destabilizing the city's defenses. Your task is to gather evidence of their activities and present it to Director Myra Kess for further action.

*Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Sanctum Quarter*

title: Axe of Fire
body:
**Iron Fang Consortium — Axe of Fire**
*Tier: Rift | Expires: TBD | Reward: 200 EC + 150 Kharma*

Ragard Gronhammer, your reputation as a fierce Champion of the Iron Banner has reached the ears of Serrik Dhal, leader of the Iron Fang Consortium. He requires your aid in retrieving an artifact lost deep within a recently opened rift. The object is said to be a legendary weapon imbued with fire magic — Ragard's Axe.

*Contact: Serrik Dhal, Guild Spires*

Your mission is to navigate the treacherous rift and retrieve Ragard's Axe, ensuring its power does not fall into the wrong hands. Successfully complete this task, and you will be richly rewarded both in Essence Coins and Kharma. Good luck, Champion!

title: The Triumphant Leaden Crown
reward: 100 EC + a private audience with Lady Cerys Valemont
body:
**Argent Blades — The Triumphant Leaden Crown**
*Tier: local | Expires: 7 days | Reward: 100 EC + a private audience with Lady Cerys Valemont*

Contact: Rivva Daxa, Sanctum Quarter's grand arena

The Argent Blades have taken note of your exceptional combat prowess, Lammis. We require you to challenge one of our fighters in the arena for a special purpose. A powerful adversary has been plaguing us lately, and we believe you are the one who can dispel him from our games. Defeat this opponent and prove yourself worthy to stand amongst the Argent Blades' champions. Your victory will not go unnoticed, Lammis of the Leaden Crown.

title: The Lost Vault of Marduk
body:
**Iron Fang Consortium — The Lost Vault of Marduk**
*Tier: Dungeon | Expires: TBD | Reward: 100 EC + 75 Kharma*

Deep in the heart of the Outer Wall lies a long-forgotten ruin, rumored to hold relics beyond comprehension. Delve into the ancient Marduk's Collapse and retrieve the lost artifacts within for Serrik Dhal at the Iron Fang Consortium. The entrance is located in the northernmost part of the Outer Wall, behind the crumbling remains of an old watchtower. Beware, adventurer: the vault has been sealed since the time of the First Rift, and its secrets are sure to be guarded by perilous traps and powerful creatures.

title: Shards of the Past
body:
**Glass Sigil — Shards of the Past**
*Tier: Escort | Expires: TBD | Reward: 100 EC + 100 Kharma*

A team of Glass Sigil archaeologists, led by Senior Archivist Pell, have unearthed an ancient artifact deep within the Outer Wall. They require protection as they transport it to the Guild Spires for further study.

*Contact: Senior Archivist Pell, Guild Spires*

title: The Broken Crown's Mending
body:
**Iron Fang Consortium — The Broken Crown's Mending**
*Tier: High-stakes | Expires: TBD | Reward: 1000 EC + 250 Kharma*

In the heart of the Sanctum Quarter, the Broken Crown, a divine artifact of unparalleled power, lies shattered. Retrieve its shards from the various factions that have seized them, and return the Crown to its rightful place before the next celestial alignment or face the wrath of its divine masters.

*Contact: Serrik Dhal, The Hollow Market*

title: The Unforgiven Crown
body:
**Wardens of Ash — The Unforgiven Crown**
*Tier: local | Expires: TBD | Reward: 100 EC + 100 Kharma*

The Wardens of Ash seek the aid of a warrior renowned for their Leaden Crown. Word has reached Captain Havel Korin that a past deed is haunting Lammis, a debt yet unpaid. The captain has a lead on the individual seeking vengeance: a rogue mercenary named Drazhil, known to frequent the Outer Wall's Black Market. Lammis, confront Drazhil and put an end to this long-standing feud.

Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Sanctum Quarter.

title: The Missing Swordsworn
body:
**Argent Blades — The Missing Swordsworn**
*Tier: Investigation | Expires: TBD | Reward: 75 EC + 100 Kharma*

Lady Cerys Valemont's personal swordsworn, Serel, has gone missing. Last seen in the Grand Forum, her disappearance is troubling, as she was investigating a corruption case involving a high-ranking Iron Fang Consortium member. Find out what happened to Serel, and bring any evidence of the corruption to light.

*Contact: Lady Cerys Valemont, Sanctum Quarter*

title: The Missing Messenger
body:
**Wardens of Ash — The Missing Messenger**
*Tier: Local | Expires: TBD | Reward: 50 EC + 20 Kharma*

A messenger carrying important documents for Captain Havel Korin has gone missing in the Warrens. The documents are crucial to the defence of our city. You are to locate the missing messenger and retrieve the documents.

*Contact: Constable Kael, Grand Forum*

title: The Divine Herald
body:
**Wardens of Ash — The Divine Herald**
*Tier: Investigation | Expires: In 14 days | Reward: 100 EC + 50 Kharma*

Boxxo, the Wardens seek your expertise. A rumor whispers of an impending divine event, one that could alter the balance of power in the Undercity. Investigate the prophecy's source and uncover the identity of the divine herald.

Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Sanctum Quarter, near the Wardens of Ash headquarters.

title: The Whispering Wall
body:
**Wardens of Ash — The Whispering Wall**
*Tier: Local | Expires: 5 days | Reward: 30 EC + 50 Kharma*

Reports have come in of strange whispers and unusual activity around the Whispering Wall, a crumbling section of the city's Outer Wall near the Grand Forum. The Wardens are seeking a team of skilled adventurers to investigate and ensure no threats are lurking within.

*Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Sanctum Quarter*

title: A Champion's Challenge
body:
**Argent Blades — A Champion's Challenge**
*Tier: Escort | Expires: Day 21 | Reward: 150 EC, 100 Kharma*

*Contact: Lady Cerys Valemont, Grand Forum*

The city's foremost gladiator, Lady Cerys Valemont, has issued a personal challenge to the iron-clad champion, Ragard Gronhammer. A rare, mythical creature, the Fire Wyrm, has been spotted roaming the Outer Wall. The wyrm's fiery breath threatens to tear apart the city's defenses. Lady Valemont seeks Ragard's aid in defeating the beast and restoring peace to the Undercity. The champion's renowned prowess with his flaming axe makes him the ideal choice for this task.

title: The Precious Cargo Escort
body:
**Iron Fang Consortium — The Precious Cargo Escort**
*Tier: Escort | Expires: TBD | Reward: 50 EC + 50 Kharma*

Travel to the Outer Wall and escort a valuable shipment of relics to the Sanctum Quarter. The relics are vital to the Consortium's work, and must not fall into the wrong hands. Contact: Elder Zara, Market Infinite.

title: The Broken Pact
body:
**Iron Fang Consortium — The Broken Pact**
*Tier: Investigation | Expires: TBD | Reward: 70 EC + 100 Kharma*

Investigate the sudden disappearance of a prominent member of the Iron Fang Consortium, Valthar Dhal, last seen at the Outer Wall Market District. Rumors of a betrayal within the ranks are spreading, and evidence suggests he may have been involved. Gather information about the missing consortium member and any potential traitors to ensure the integrity of the Iron Fang Consortium remains intact.

Contact: Valthar's right-hand, Mia Dhal, at the Grand Forum.

title: Whispers of a Fallen Hero
body:
**Argent Blades — Whispers of a Fallen Hero**
*Tier: Investigation | Expires: 14 days | Reward: 75 EC + 50 Kharma*

Contact: Lady Cerys Valemont, Grand Forum

The Argent Blades seek Boxxo's unique talents in unraveling a mystery that has plagued our Glory-seekers. A sacred relic, once held by one of our fallen heroes, has vanished, and whispers suggest it may be linked to the Serpent Choir. Retrieve the relic and bring the traitor to justice.

title: The Silent Saboteur
body:
**Iron Fang Consortium — The Silent Saboteur**
*Tier: Epic | Expires: TBD | Reward: 1000 EC + 300 Kharma*

An influential figure in the Wardens of Ash has become a threat to the Iron Fang Consortium's operations in the Grand Forum. Captain Havel Korin requests your assistance in eliminating this problem. Infiltrate the Wardens' headquarters, locate the target, and execute the silent saboteur. Be discreet; the last thing we need is a public scandal.

*Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Guild Spires*

title: The Missing Messenger
body:
**Iron Fang Consortium — The Missing Messenger**
*Tier: Local | Expires: TBD | Reward: 50 EC + 50 Kharma*

A courier working for the Iron Fang Consortium has gone missing in the Guild Spires. We need someone to find him and retrieve the valuable relics he was transporting. Contact: Vex, Guild Spires Marketplace.

title: Whispers of the Celestial Guardian
body:
**Iron Fang Consortium — Whispers of the Celestial Guardian**
*Tier: Investigation | Expires: TBD | Reward: 100 EC + 150 Kharma*

A source claims to have knowledge of a hidden sanctuary housing a relic of the Celestial Guardian, a legendary order of divine warriors said to have once protected your kind. The information was obtained by the Iron Fang Consortium, but they've been unable to verify its authenticity. They seek a sorcerer with a divine soul, like yourself, to investigate this matter.

*Contact: Kaelar, Sanctum Quarter*

You are to meet with Kaelar, an Iron Fang Consortium liaison, at the fountain in the Sanctum Quarter. He will provide you with further details and instructions on how to locate the sanctuary. Proceed with caution, as this information could shake the foundations of your people's history.

title: The Shattered Vault of the Damned
body:
**Serpent Choir — The Shattered Vault of the Damned**
*Tier: Rift | Expires: TBD | Reward: 200 EC + 150 Kharma*

For the faithful and the brave, a chance to explore the ancient ruins of the Damned Vault, sealed beneath the Outer Wall for millennia. The relics within have been calling out, whispering dark secrets to the restless dead. Seek out High Apostle Yzura in the Sanctum Quarter to receive your blessing and a divine map to the vault's entrance. May the Light guide you, and may you return with the power to strengthen our faith.

*Contact: High Apostle Yzura, Sanctum Quarter*

title: The Tower's Forgotten Relic
body:
**Iron Fang Consortium — The Tower's Forgotten Relic**
*Tier: Epic | Expires: TBD | Reward: 1000 EC + 500 Kharma + 10 LP*

The Iron Fang Consortium seeks a team of brave adventurers to retrieve an artifact lost within the Tower of Last Chance. Legends speak of the "Relic of the First Dawn," a powerful item said to have been placed within the tower by its original architect. If found, it could rewrite the history of the Undercity.

*Contact: Serrik Dhal, Iron Fang Consortium Office, Grand Forum*

title: The Veiled Threat
body:
**Wardens of Ash — The Veiled Threat**
*Tier: Investigation | Expires: TBD | Reward: 100 EC + 50 Kharma*

After a series of mysterious disappearances within the Guild Spires, Captain Havel Korin has requested your assistance in uncovering the source of this unrest. Investigate the disappearance of a prominent Warden officer, Captain Veris, and follow the trail of corruption that threatens the safety of the Guild Spires.

*Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Guild Spires*

title: The Shadow's Echo
body:
**Iron Fang Consortium — The Shadow's Echo**
*Tier: Local | Expires: TBD | Reward: 75 EC + 50 Kharma*

Warforged sorcerer Boxxo, your unique skills are needed. A familiar face, the rogue sergeant Karnax, resurfaces in the Grand Forum. He has information on an impending attack on the Wardens of Ash, and seeks your help to expose him. Find and interrogate Karnax to prevent the attack and secure the Wardens' safety.

*Contact: Karnax, Grand Forum*

title: The Last Defence of the Tower
body:
**Wardens of Ash — The Last Defence of the Tower**
*Tier: Epic | Expires: TBD | Reward: 1500 EC + 500 Kharma*

The Wardens of Ash call for your aid in the Tower's highest levels, where the last line of defence against the encroaching rifts lies. The Captain Havel Korin himself requests your presence in the Sanctum Quarter, where he will brief you on the situation. Your objective: fortify the Tower's defences and repel the invading forces before they breach the city.

*Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Sanctum Quarter*

title: The Shard's Shadow
body:
**Iron Fang Consortium — The Shard's Shadow**
*Tier: High-Stakes | Expires: TBD | Reward: 500 EC + 200 Kharma*

Unravel the mysteries of the Obsidian Shard, a long-lost relic said to hold immense power. Retrieve it from the depths of the Rift of Whispers, before it falls into the wrong hands. Contact: Serrik Dhal, Grand Forum.

title: The Rift's Relentless Advance
body:
**Iron Fang Consortium — The Rift's Relentless Advance**
*Tier: Rift | Expires: TBD | Reward: 100 EC + 100 Kharma*

A new Rift has emerged in the heart of the Grand Forum, threatening to engulf the district in its ever-growing maw. The Iron Fang Consortium seeks brave adventurers to seal it before it grows further. Speak with Serrik Dhal at the Iron Fang Hideout in the Outer Wall for mission details and compensation.

title: The Lost Messenger
body:
**Wardens of Ash — The Lost Messenger**
*Tier: Local | Expires: TBD | Reward: 15 EC + 20 Kharma*

A courier carrying sensitive information for the Wardens of Ash has gone missing in the Outer Wall district. Captain Havel Korin requests your assistance in finding the missing courier and retrieving the information they were carrying.

*Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Outer Wall Watchtower*

title: The Suspicious Eye
body:
**Wardens of Ash — The Suspicious Eye**
*Tier: Local | Expires: TBD | Reward: 50 EC + 25 Kharma*

Reports of unusual activity at the East Eye Bastion, a watchtower near the Grand Forum. Sweep the area for any signs of intrusion or unnatural phenomena. Report back to Captain Havel Korin in the Sanctum Quarter once complete.

*Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Sanctum Quarter*

title: The Whispering Wraith
body:
**Argent Blades — The Whispering Wraith**
*Tier: Investigation | Expires: TBD | Reward: 150 EC + 75 Kharma*

Investigate the haunting of a noble family, the Vharlens, residing in the Grand Forum. The family's matriarch claims a spectral figure has been terrorizing her household, causing a rift within their once harmonious domain. Speak with Lady Vharlen at the Grand Forum for further details and your assignment. Be warned, the specter is said to be vengeful and cunning, so tread carefully.

title: Feathers for the Fallen
body:
**The Wardens of Ash — Feathers for the Fallen**
*Tier: Escort | Expires: Day 14 | Reward: 100 EC + 20 Kharma*

Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Outer Wall Watchtower

Legendary Pipeline Owlin, S'kree, your unique abilities and combat prowess are sought for an urgent mission. We've received intelligence that a powerful Owlin feather collector, known as The Avian Assembler, is planning to infiltrate our city. Aiding our forces in escorting a valuable prisoner, believed to be the Avian Assembler, through the Outer Wall and into the safety of the Watchtower. Your rare stature and combat skills make you the ideal candidate to blend in and ensure the prisoner's safe delivery.

title: Iron Fang Consortium - The Haunting of Fadeworth
body:
**Iron Fang Consortium - The Haunting of Fadeworth**
*Tier: Local | Expires: 3 Days | Reward: 50 EC + 20 Kharma*

A contact within the Iron Fang Consortium, Serrik Dhal, has a personal request for Keta Fadeworth. He can be found in the Grand Forum near the eastern fountain. He believes that Keta's Aether-Touched nature is attracting unwanted attention from a powerful entity. He seeks her expertise in dealing with a supernatural presence that has been haunting the Iron Fang Consortium's warehouse in the Warrens.

*Contact: Serrik Dhal, Grand Forum (Eastern Fountain)*

title: Wardens of Ash - The Hidden Incursion
body:
**Wardens of Ash - The Hidden Incursion**
*Tier: Local | Expires: TBD | Reward: 50 EC + 50 Kharma*

The Warden Captain Havel Korin has received reports of an unknown faction operating within the Warrens, near the Outer Wall. He needs a team of brave adventurers to sweep the district, ensuring the safety of its residents and locating any signs of the intruders.

*Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Sanctum Quarter*

title: Echoes of the Past
body:
**Iron Fang Consortium — Echoes of the Past**
*Tier: Local | Expires: TBD | Reward: 30 EC + 20 Kharma*

S'kree, a name that's been whispered in dark corners of the Warrens. The Iron Fang Consortium has received intelligence regarding an old enemy of yours resurfacing. They seek your expertise to take care of this matter.

*Contact: Serrik Dhal, Grand Forum*

Your objective is to locate and neutralize the individual known as Zhur'koth, a rogue Pipeline Owlin who has been causing chaos in the Warrens. Word has it he's amassing a small army of his kind. Be careful, S'kree, as he's familiar with your unique abilities. The stakes are high, but the payoff is worth it. Take down the competition.

title: The Return of the Vengeful
body:
**Patchwork Saints — The Return of the Vengeful**
*Tier: local | Expires: TBD | Reward: 25 EC + 50 Kharma*

The Warrens' Patchwork Saints are seeking your unique talents, Keta Fadeworth. We've received word that a certain figure from your past, The Widow's right hand, has resurfaced within the Warrens. We believe she's stirring up trouble and it's our duty to put a stop to it. Find her, and bring her to justice.

Contact: Patchwork Prelate Vex, The Warrens' Widow's Bounty.

title: Whispers from the Shadows
body:
**Serpent Choir — Whispers from the Shadows**
*Tier: inter-guild | Expires: TBD | Reward: 150 EC + 100 Kharma*

The Serpent Choir suspects the Argent Blades are tampering with their divine contracts. You are to infiltrate their inner circle and gather evidence. Seek out Lady Cerys Valemont's trusted advisor, Eira, at the Argent Blades' training grounds in Grand Forum. Your mission is to uncover any incriminating information and return to report your findings to High Apostle Yzura at the Serpent Choir's Sanctum Quarter headquarters. Proceed with caution; the Argent Blades are known to be ruthless when it comes to preserving their reputation.

title: The Stability's Pulse
body:
**Wardens of Ash — The Stability's Pulse**
*Tier: Investigation | Expires: TBD | Reward: 85 EC + 50 Kharma*

Ward Captain Havel Korin requests Eleanor Reed's aid. Meet him at the Outer Wall Observatory. The recent increase in Rifts has strained the city's defenses, and Captain Korin suspects a strange pattern in their occurrence. He believes Eleanor's Ward of Stability and Temporal Insight might reveal its cause. Your mission: investigate the Rift patterns and report back to the Wardens of Ash with your findings.

title: The Rift of the Warrens' Heart
body:
**Argent Blades — The Rift of the Warrens' Heart**
*Tier: Rift | Expires: TBD | Reward: 100 EC + 100 Kharma*

A Rift has torn open in the very heart of the Warrens, threatening to swallow whole several blocks of the district. The Argent Blades seek able adventurers to close it before it can cause further damage. Speak with Captain Kaelan, at the Argent Blades' Grand Arena.

*Contact: Captain Kaelan, Grand Arena, Sanctum Quarter*

title: The Shielded Convoy
body:
**Iron Fang Consortium — The Shielded Convoy**
*Tier: Escort | Expires: TBD | Reward: 80 EC + 75 Kharma*

A valuable relic is making its way through the dangerous Outer Wall, and the Iron Fang Consortium needs a reliable team to ensure its safe arrival. Meet Senior Smuggler Varnis Thorne in the Grand Forum for mission briefing and allocation of your charges. Protect the convoy from potential raiders and ward off any Rifts that may open along the way. Be prepared for ambushes and encounters with hostile factions as you escort the relic to its destination: Markets Infinite.

title: Echoes of the Vengeful
body:
**Argent Blades — Echoes of the Vengeful**
*Tier: Standard | Expires: 21 Days | Reward: 125 EC + 50 Kharma*

Contact: Lady Cerys Valemont, Grand Forum

Lady Cerys Valemont has a task for you, Keta Fadeworth. It concerns an old debt that has come due. A vengeful spirit from a past battle has taken a personal interest in you and is causing trouble for the Argent Blades. Track down the spirit and put an end to its wrath. The spirit is rumored to be lurking in the Warrens, where it has been harassing locals and causing small rifts. The proof of its defeat should be enough to settle the debt with Lady Valemont. Good luck, Artificer.

title: The Echoing Hollow
body:
**Wardens of Ash — The Echoing Hollow**
*Tier: Local | Expires: TBD | Reward: 50 EC + 30 Kharma*

Reports of strange occurrences in the Echoing Hollow, a once peaceful district near the Outer Wall. Investigate the source of these disturbances and ensure the safety of the area's inhabitants. Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Guild Spires.

title: Echoes of a Forgotten Battle
body:
**Argent Blades — Echoes of a Forgotten Battle**
*Tier: Escort | Expires: 21 days | Reward: 130 EC + 75 Kharma*

Eleanor Reed, your arcane prowess is needed once more. The Argent Blades request your aid in dealing with an old rival from your Wizards Tower days. A rogue mage, Aiden Stormfist, has resurfaced and is causing trouble in the Sanctum Quarter.

*Contact: Captain Thorne, Sanctum Quarter Square*

Your objective is to escort Lady Cerys Valemont to a meeting with Stormfist and prevent any hostilities from escalating. Aiden Stormfist has been known to favor rifts, so be prepared for the unexpected.

title: The Shadowed Heir
body:
**Wardens of Ash — The Shadowed Heir**
*Tier: high-stakes | Expires: TBD | Reward: 500 EC + 200 Kharma*

A dangerous artifact has surfaced, a dagger rumored to be the only weapon capable of slaying a certain high-ranking member of the Serpent Choir. If true, this could tip the balance of power in the Undercity. You'll need to retrieve the dagger from the Obsidian Lotus' Black Market. Be warned, the dagger is said to be guarded by the feared Black Hand, a group of deadly assassins.

*Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Sanctum Quarter*

title: Echoes of the Divine Reckoning
body:
**The Serpent Choir — Echoes of the Divine Reckoning**
*Tier: Epic | Expires: TBD | Reward: 1000 EC + 1000 Kharma*

A cataclysmic rift has opened in the heart of the Grand Forum, threatening to shatter the very Tower of Last Chance. High Apostle Yzura seeks brave adventurers to delve into the rift and retrieve the shards of a sacred artifact stolen by the Serpent Choir. The artifact is said to contain the power to seal the rift and save the city.

*Contact: High Apostle Yzura, Sanctum Quarter*

title: Echoes of the Last Bastion
body:
**The Wardens of Ash — Echoes of the Last Bastion**
*Tier: Epic | Expires: TBD | Reward: 1000 EC + 500 Kharma*

Another rift has torn open near the Outer Wall, threatening to breach the defenses of the Last Chance Tower itself. The Wardens of Ash have called upon the city's most experienced adventurers to stem the tide. Speak with Captain Havel Korin at the Grand Forum for further instructions and to receive your assignment.

*Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Grand Forum*

title: The Iron Fang Consortium - A Veil of Secrets Unraveled
body:
**The Iron Fang Consortium - A Veil of Secrets Unraveled**
*Tier: Inter-guild | Expires: TBD | Reward: 150 EC + 100 Kharma*

Information regarding a covert operation between the Argent Blades and the Obsidian Lotus has come to light. We need a skilled operative to infiltrate the Argent Blades' Grand Forum hideout, gather evidence, and discreetly sabotage their plans without alerting the Argent Blades to your presence.

Contact: Senior Archivist Pell, Guild Spires

*Note: This mission is of the utmost importance, and failure to complete it could have severe consequences for the Iron Fang Consortium and the Undercity as a whole.*

title: The Ethereal Vengeance
body:
**Wardens of Ash — The Ethereal Vengeance**
*Tier: Investigation | Expires: TBD | Reward: 120 EC + 100 Kharma*

Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Sanctum Quarter

Keta Fadeworth, we require your unique talents for a matter of utmost urgency. Reports of a spectral presence haunting the Outer Wall's watchtowers have reached our ears. The nature of this haunting suggests it may be tied to your Aether-Touched abilities. The Wardens seek to uncover the source of this disturbance and need you to infiltrate the Ethereal Plane to do so. Proceed to the Sanctum Quarter and seek out Captain Havel Korin. He will provide further instructions and rewards if you are successful in exorcising this spectral menace.

title: The Veiled Whisperer's Downfall
body:
**The Iron Fang Consortium — The Veiled Whisperer's Downfall**
*Tier: High-stakes | Expires: TBD | Reward: 500 EC + 100 Kharma*

A shadowy figure known only as The Veiled Whisperer has been disrupting trade in the Outer Wall, causing fear and uncertainty among the merchants. The Iron Fang Consortium needs a skilled hand to put an end to this menace.

*Contact: Valdor, The Raven's Perch, Outer Wall*

title: The Market's Influence Shift
body:
**Tower Authority — The Market's Influence Shift**
*Tier: Tower | Expires: TBD | Reward: 200 EC + 100 Kharma*

Infiltrate the Iron Fang Consortium's operations within the Markets Infinite to sabotage their power base, working closely with Director Myra Kess and her agents. Be cautious, as their influence runs deep.

*Contact: Agent Elys, Guild Spires, Lower Level 3*

title: The Shieldbearer's Voyage
body:
**The Argent Blades — The Shieldbearer's Voyage**
*Tier: Escort | Expires: TBD | Reward: 150 EC + 100 Kharma*

Embark on a vital journey through the treacherous Outer Wall, escorting the esteemed Lady Cerys Valemont to a clandestine meeting with a foreign envoy. The safety of the city's most celebrated warrior depends on your unwavering vigilance and combat prowess.

*Contact: Lady Cerys Valemont, Sanctum Quarter*

title: The Watchful Eye
body:
**The Wardens of Ash — The Watchful Eye**
*Tier: Local | Expires: TBD | Reward: 35 EC + 30 Kharma*

Following a series of strange occurrences in the Grand Forum, the Wardens of Ash request your assistance in a district sweep. Investigate any signs of unrest or unusual activity, focusing on the southern sector of the Grand Forum. Report back to Captain Havel Korin at the Watchtower for debriefing.

*Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Watchtower in Grand Forum*

title: The Hidden Cache
body:
**Obsidian Lotus — The Hidden Cache**
*Tier: Rift | Expires: TBD | Reward: 250 EC + 150 Kharma*

Infiltrate the Glass Sigil's secret vault and retrieve stolen artifacts before they are sold on the black market. The Widow's latest acquisition may have been a raid on the arcane archivists' most closely guarded treasures.

*Contact: Senior Archivist Pell, Guild Spires*

title: The Iron Fang's Veiled Betrayal
body:
**The Wardens of Ash — The Iron Fang's Veiled Betrayal**
*Tier: Inter-guild | Expires: TBD | Reward: 250 EC + 50 Kharma*

The Iron Fang Consortium has grown suspicious of the Wardens of Ash, accusing them of smuggling relics through the Outer Wall. You are to infiltrate the Wardens' stronghold in Sanctum Quarter and gather evidence of their misdeeds. Be cautious, as Captain Havel Korin himself will be overseeing this operation.

*Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Guild Spires*

title: The Eclipse's Apex
body:
**The Serpent Choir — The Eclipse's Apex**
*Tier: High-stakes | Expires: TBD | Reward: 200 EC + 150 Kharma*

A shadowy cult, The Eclipse, is rumored to have obtained a powerful relic in the Outer Wall. The Serpent Choir seeks a seasoned adventurer to infiltrate their ranks and retrieve the artifact before it falls into the wrong hands.

*Contact: High Apostle Yzura, Sanctum Quarter*

title: The Whispers of Fate
body:
**Guild of Ashen Scrolls — The Whispers of Fate**
*Tier: Major | Expires: TBD | Reward: 150 EC + 200 Kharma*

An ancient prophecy hidden deep within the Warrens has surfaced, hinting at a cataclysmic event that threatens the Undercity. Decipher the cryptic text to understand its ominous implications and potentially change the course of our future.

*Contact: Eir Velan, Guild of Ashen Scrolls, Guild Spires*

title: The Widow's Web
body:
**Obsidian Lotus — The Widow's Web**
*Tier: Investigation | Expires: TBD | Reward: 100 EC + 50 Kharma*

Unravel a series of black market transactions linked to The Widow, gaining insight into her operations and potentially disrupting her influence. The key to this investigation lies with a notorious merchant known as Silent Tom, hidden in The Warrens. Be warned, this job is dangerous and should only be undertaken by those unafraid of drawing the ire of The Widow.

*Contact: Silent Tom, The Warrens (Northwestern Quarters)*

title: The Shield of Valor
body:
**Argent Blades — The Shield of Valor**
*Tier: Escort | Expires: TBD | Reward: 100 EC + 100 Kharma*

Protect Lady Cerys Valemont through the dangerous streets of The Warrens to her requested destination in the Sanctum Quarter. She is carrying a relic of great value to the Argent Blades, and her life is in constant peril. Meet Lady Cerys at the Grand Forum, noon sharp.

*Contact: Lady Cerys Valemont, Grand Forum*

title: The Chronicles of the Forgotten Realm
body:
**Glass Sigil — The Chronicles of the Forgotten Realm**
*Tier: Standard | Expires: TBD | Reward: 200 EC + 50 Kharma*

Assist Senior Archivist Pell in deciphering ancient tomes hidden within the Guild Spires, uncovering secrets of the realm. The cryptic texts may hold answers to long-lost spells or powerful knowledge that could benefit the city.

*Contact: Senior Archivist Pell, Glass Sigil Spire*

title: The Noble's Chains
body:
**Argent Blades — The Noble's Chains**
*Tier: Epic | Expires: TBD | Reward: 500 EC + 300 Kharma*

Join the prestigious Argent Blades in a daring rescue mission! Secure the release of a captive noble from the clutches of the Serpent Choir in the dangerous Warrens district. Your valor and skill will be tested as you face off against the divine followers and their treacherous leader, High Apostle Yzura.

*Contact: Lady Cerys Valemont, Grand Forum*

title: The Noble's Rescue
body:
**Argent Blades — The Noble's Rescue**
*Tier: Epic | Expires: TBD | Reward: 500 EC + 200 Kharma*

Secure the release of Lady Evelyn, a captive noble from the clutches of the Serpent Choir in the Warrens. Risk life and legend in a daring raid on their hidden sanctuary.

Contact: Lady Cerys Valemont, Argent Blades Arena

title: Shadows of the Warrens
body:
**Iron Fang Consortium — Shadows of the Warrens**
*Tier: Investigation | Expires: TBD | Reward: 100 EC + 50 Kharma*

Investigate the sudden disappearance of a key member of the Iron Fang Consortium deep within the Warrens. Rumors suggest an insidious influence at work, and your skills are needed to uncover the truth. Contact Senior Consort Eilif, at the Iron Fang Consortium hideout in the Outer Wall.

title: The Shadowed Exchange
body:
**Obsidian Lotus — The Shadowed Exchange**
*Tier: Major | Expires: TBD | Reward: 150 EC + 100 Kharma*

Facilitate a lucrative trade with The Widow in the shadowy alleys of The Warrens, under the watchful eyes of the Patchwork Saints. Be warned, the Patchwork Saints will expect a cut of your earnings.

*Contact: The Widow, The Warrens*

title: The Shattered Alliances
body:
**Wardens of Ash — The Shattered Alliances**
*Tier: Inter-guild | Expires: TBD | Reward: 50 EC + 50 Kharma*

The Wardens of Ash seek your assistance in resolving a heated conflict between the Iron Fang Consortium and the Argent Blades. Infiltrate their respective strongholds and gather incriminating evidence of their clandestine dealings. The Iron Fang Consortium operates out of the Outer Wall, while the Argent Blades can be found in Sanctum Quarter.

Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Grand Forum.

title: Lost among the Warrens
body:
**Patchwork Saints — Lost among the Warrens**
*Tier: local | Expires: TBD | Reward: 50 EC*

A courier has gone missing in the Warrens, and the Patchwork Saints need someone to find them. Their last known location was near the Hollowed Den, where they were due to deliver sensitive information. If you can find the missing courier and deliver the information to Captain Lysander at the Hollowed Den, the Saints will reward you handsomely.

*Contact: Captain Lysander, Hollowed Den, Warrens*

title: Threads of Fate
body:
**Guild of Ashen Scrolls — Threads of Fate**
*Tier: investigation | Expires: TBD | Reward: 100 EC + 100 Kharma*

Unravel a complex web of destinies in the Sanctum Quarter, guided by Eir Velan and the FTA's Director Myra Kess. The prophecy of a calamitous rift predicts a cataclysmic event that will shatter the Undercity's fate. Time is running out.

*Contact: Eir Velan, Guild of Ashen Scrolls, Sanctum Quarter*

title: Whispered Exchanges
body:
**Obsidian Lotus — Whispered Exchanges**
*Tier: Major | Expires: TBD | Reward: 300 EC + 50 Kharma*

Infiltrate the hidden marketplace in The Warrens, where The Widow conducts her lucrative trades. The Patchwork Saints maintain a watchful presence, so tread lightly and keep your wits about you.

*Contact: The Widow, The Warrens (near the heart of the district)*

title: The Wall's Resilience
body:
**Wardens of Ash — The Wall's Resilience**
*Tier: Major | Expires: TBD | Reward: 50 EC + 150 Kharma*

Join Captain Havel Korin and the Wardens of Ash in a city-defense operation to safeguard the Outer Wall from a looming threat. As the Iron Fang Consortium lends aid, you'll be instrumental in fortifying the wall and repelling the enemy forces.

*Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Grand Forum*

title: The Shadow's Embrace
body:
**Serpent Choir — The Shadow's Embrace**
*Tier: High-stakes | Expires: TBD | Reward: 1500 EC + 300 Kharma*

Embark on a daring infiltration into the Iron Fang Consortium's hidden stronghold within the Warrens. Your objective: recover the stolen relic known as the 'Embrace of Shadows'. Speak with Brother Kyrin in the Sanctum Quarter for further instructions.

*Contact: Brother Kyrin, Sanctum Quarter*

title: The Missing Courier
body:
**Wardens of Ash — The Missing Courier**
*Tier: local | Expires: TBD | Reward: 50 EC + 50 Kharma*

The Wardens of Ash have received word of a missing courier, last seen in the Grand Forum. They suspect foul play and require your help to find him. Speak with Captain Havel Korin at the Watchtower in the Grand Forum to begin your search.

title: The Broken Alliance
body:
**Iron Fang Consortium — The Broken Alliance**
*Tier: Inter-guild | Expires: TBD | Reward: 100 EC + 50 Kharma*

Follow the rumors of a growing alliance between the Serpent Choir and the Obsidian Lotus. Gather intel on their secret meetings and plans. Infiltrate the Serpent Choir stronghold in the Outer Wall and recover any evidence of their collaboration. Meet with Senior Archivist Pell at the Glass Sigil in the Guild Spires for your assignment.

title: Missing Artifact Retrieval
body:
**Iron Fang Consortium — Missing Artifact Retrieval**
*Tier: local | Expires: TBD | Reward: 50 EC + 50 Kharma*

The Iron Fang Consortium needs you to retrieve a stolen artifact from the Outer Wall. The thief, a known associate of The Widow, has taken the item from the Black Market district. Speak with Senior Archivist Pell at the Guild Spires for further instructions.

*Contact: Senior Archivist Pell, Guild Spires*

title: The Shadowed Exchange
body:
**Obsidian Lotus — The Shadowed Exchange**
*Tier: Standard | Expires: TBD | Reward: 100 EC + 50 Kharma*

Facilitate a lucrative trade with The Widow in the hidden corners of The Warrens, protected by the watchful eyes of the Patchwork Saints.

*Contact: The Widow, The Warrens (near the Outer Wall)*

title: The Vanishing Watch
body:
**Wardens of Ash — The Vanishing Watch**
*Tier: Investigation | Expires: TBD | Reward: 50 EC + 100 Kharma*

In the heart of the Warrens, a watchman has gone missing. Captain Havel Korin suspects foul play and needs your help to uncover the truth. Investigate the local network of the Patchwork Saints to discover the whereabouts of the missing guard.

*Contact: Captain Havel Korin, The Warrens*

title: The Iron Bargain
body:
**Argent Blades — The Iron Bargain**
*Tier: inter-guild | Expires: TBD | Reward: 300 EC + 100 Kharma*

The Argent Blades seek a skilled operative to mediate a brewing conflict between them and the Iron Fang Consortium. The negotiations are to take place at the Outer Wall's Black Market, where The Widow has agreed to act as the neutral broker. The objective: reach an agreement that benefits both factions and prevents a city-wide war.

*Contact: The Widow, Outer Wall's Black Market*

title: The Grand Forum Gladiatorial Matches
body:
**Argent Blades — The Grand Forum Gladiatorial Matches**
*Tier: Escort | Expires: TBD | Reward: 100 EC + 50 Kharma*

Lady Cerys Valemont has opened her arena for a series of duels that will test your skill and courage. Prove your worth and earn renown in the Grand Forum.

*Contact: Lady Cerys Valemont, Grand Forum*

title: The Warrens Watch
body:
**Wardens of Ash — The Warrens Watch**
*Tier: Local | Expires: TBD | Reward: 50 EC + 10 Kharma*

The Wardens of Ash have received reports of increased activity in the Warrens' southern district. Suspicious characters have been seen lurking near the abandoned Old Ironworks, and it's believed they may be planning something illicit. Your task is to sweep the area, investigate any potential threats, and report back to Captain Havel Korin at the Wardens' HQ.

*Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Wardens' Headquarters*

title: The Lost Lion's Roar
body:
**Argent Blades — The Lost Lion's Roar**
*Tier: Investigation | Expires: TBD | Reward: 100 EC + 100 Kharma*

Investigate the sudden disappearance of a high-ranking Argent Blades gladiator, Lionel Roarheart. Last seen in the Grand Forum during a night of heavy drinking, Lionel has vanished without a trace. The silence is alarming, and the Argent Blades want this matter resolved swiftly.

*Contact: Captain Veris, Sanctum Quarter*

title: The Grand Forum Gladiatorial Trials
body:
**Argent Blades — The Grand Forum Gladiatorial Trials**
*Tier: Escort | Expires: TBD | Reward: 150 EC + 75 Kharma*

Test your mettle in a series of gladiatorial matches sponsored by Lady Cerys Valemont. Join the prestigious Argent Blades duel tournament in the Grand Forum. Prove your worth and earn renown among the city's elite.

*Contact: Serjeant Varrick, Grand Forum*

title: The Missing Warrens Watchman
body:
**Patchwork Saints — The Missing Warrens Watchman**
*Tier: Investigation | Expires: TBD | Reward: 50 EC + 50 Kharma*

The Patchwork Saints are in need of your assistance. Reports of a missing Warrens Watchman have reached the ears of Captain Havel Korin, and he has tasked you with finding him. Last seen near the Warrens' western entrance, the watchman, Eamon, went missing during his nightly patrol. Your objective is to find Eamon and bring him back safe and sound.

*Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Sanctum Quarter*

title: The Wardens' Relic
body:
**Iron Fang Consortium — The Wardens' Relic**
*Tier: Escort | Expires: TBD | Reward: 100 EC + 50 Kharma*

Work for the Iron Fang Consortium as you secure a valuable relic from the vaults of the Wardens of Ash in the Outer Wall. Meet Captain Havel Korin at the Wardens' Keep for detailed instructions and your mission briefing. Navigate the heavily guarded facility, avoid detection, and retrieve the relic without causing a rift. Successfully complete this mission and you will be well-rewarded by the Iron Fang Consortium.

title: The Tower's Defender
body:
**Wardens of Ash — The Tower's Defender**
*Tier: Epic | Expires: TBD | Reward: 2000 EC + 500 Kharma*

In the heart of the Tower of Last Chance, a new danger looms. The Wardens of Ash seek a hero to defend the city against an impending attack by an ancient and powerful enemy. The fates of the Undercity and all within hang in the balance.

*Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Sanctum Quarter*

title: The Disappearing Dealer
body:
**Iron Fang Consortium — The Disappearing Dealer**
*Tier: Investigation | Expires: TBD | Reward: 100 EC + 50 Kharma*

Rumors have been swirling about a prominent merchant, Harkus Valt, who hasn't been seen or heard from in the past week. Known for his rare relics, Harkus has vanished without a trace. Investigate his last known location in the Outer Wall to uncover any leads on his whereabouts and discover the cause of his sudden disappearance.

*Contact: Elder Valt, Sanctum Quarter*

title: The Warden's Treasure
body:
**Iron Fang Consortium — The Warden's Treasure**
*Tier: Escort | Expires: TBD | Reward: 120 EC + 100 Kharma*

Secure a valuable relic from the vaults of the Wardens of Ash in the Outer Wall. Captain Havel Korin of the Wardens has reported that an ancient artifact is rumored to be missing. Work with the Iron Fang Consortium to retrieve it.

*Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Outer Wall Watchtower*

title: The Scarlet Letter
body:
**Argent Blades — The Scarlet Letter**
*Tier: Local | Expires: TBD | Reward: 100 EC + 30 Kharma*

The esteemed Gladiator Valenar, a renowned Argent Blades member, has reported his prized letter of invitation to the upcoming grand arena battle lost. The letter was last seen at the Grand Forum's arena. Find the lost invitation and return it to Gladiator Valenar to secure your next bout in the arena.

*Contact: Gladiator Valenar, Grand Forum's Arena*

title: The Outer Wall's Vigil
body:
**Wardens of Ash — The Outer Wall's Vigil**
*Tier: Escort | Expires: TBD | Reward: 100 EC + 100 Kharma*

The Wardens of Ash seek brave adventurers to join a city defense operation. A looming threat has been detected near the Outer Wall, and you are to work alongside Captain Havel Korin and the Iron Fang Consortium to protect our city's first line of defense. The mission will test your skill and courage, but the reward is worth the risk.

*Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Grand Forum*

title: Lady Cerys Valemont's Challenge
body:
**Argent Blades — Lady Cerys Valemont's Challenge**
*Tier: Epic | Expires: TBD | Reward: 500 EC + 100 Kharma + 10 LP*

Prove your valor in a series of trials, each more perilous than the last, as Lady Cerys Valemont tests your mettle in the arena. Demonstrate your worth and secure your place among the elite fighters of the Argent Blades.

*Contact: Lady Cerys Valemont, Grand Forum*

title: The Warrens' Unrest
body:
**Patchwork Saints — The Warrens' Unrest**
*Tier: Investigation | Expires: TBD | Reward: 100 EC + 50 Kharma*

Unrest and violence have spiked in the Warrens, a clear sign of growing internal tensions. The Adventurers Guild needs an investigator to delve into the matter and report back on the state of the city's most vulnerable district. Speak with Patchwork Saints leader, Gideon Stoneshaper, at the Warrens' central square to take up this important mission.

title: The Missing Delivery
body:
**Iron Fang Consortium — The Missing Delivery**
*Tier: Local | Expires: TBD | Reward: 15 EC + 50 Kharma*

A courier working for the Iron Fang Consortium has gone missing while delivering a package to a client in the Grand Forum. The consortium fears the package contained valuable relics and is seeking an adventurer to retrieve it. Speak with Serrik Dhal at the consortium's office in the Grand Forum for further details.

*Contact: Serrik Dhal, Grand Forum*

title: Whispers of a Forgotten Past
body:
**Serpent Choir — Whispers of a Forgotten Past**
*Tier: Escort | Expires: TBD | Reward: 125 EC + 50 Kharma*

Boxxo, the Serpent Choir seeks your aid. Meet with High Apostle Yzura in the Sanctum Quarter. A rumor has surfaced about an ancient artifact believed to have been lost in the Outer Wall. This artifact, if found, could provide insight into your divine soul's origins. Protect Yzura as she investigates this lead. The fate of your unique essence could be at stake.

title: Obsidian Obligation
body:
**Obsidian Lotus — Obsidian Obligation**
*Tier: Escort | Expires: TBD | Reward: 150 EC + 50 Kharma*

Discreetly transport contraband between the Outer Wall and the Iron Fang Consortium's hidden cache. Meet with The Widow at the Obsidian Lotus's safehouse in Sanctum Quarter to receive your package. Deliver it without incident to the Iron Fang Consortium's representative at the Outer Wall's watchtower.

*Contact: The Widow, Obsidian Lotus's safehouse (Sanctum Quarter)*

title: Ash's Assault
body:
**Wardens of Ash — Ash's Assault**
*Tier: Epic | Expires: TBD | Reward: 1000 EC + 200 Kharma*

Lead a squad of Wardens against an unexpected attack on the Sanctum Quarter from a mysterious, shadowy foe. Captain Havel Korin needs your help to protect the city's most sacred ground.

*Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Sanctum Quarter*

title: The Shielded Convoy
body:
**Iron Fang Consortium — The Shielded Convoy**
*Tier: Escort | Expires: TBD | Reward: 100 EC + 50 Kharma*

Travel through the treacherous Outer Wall with the Iron Fang Consortium's valuable cargo, protecting it from rival factions and the dangers of the Rifts. The convoy will be under your command, led by the Consortium's seasoned captain, Rhenna Valtor. Your objective is to ensure the safe arrival at Guild Spires.

*Contact: Rhenna Valtor, Outer Wall checkpoint*

title: The Ethereal Echoes Persist
body:
**Glass Sigil — The Ethereal Echoes Persist**
*Tier: Investigation | Expires: TBD | Reward: 100 EC + 50 Kharma*

Senior Archivist Pell requests Keta Fadeworth's expertise. Meet at the Glass Sigil headquarters in Guild Spires, second level.

Pell believes that the recent disturbances in the Warrens are linked to Keta's past encounters with the Vengeful. She needs Keta's unique insight to trace the source of these echoes and prevent further disruptions in the city. The fate of the Undercity may rest on Keta's abilities as an Aether-Touched Artificer.

title: Echoes of an Unseen Past
body:
**Argent Blades — Echoes of an Unseen Past**
*Tier: Investigation | Expires: TBD | Reward: 150 EC + 50 Kharma*

Eleanor Reed, your arcane insight and affinity for the arcane make you our best choice for this urgent investigation. Rumors have circulated of a relic from the distant past, one that could shift the balance of power in the Undercity. Contact Lady Cerys Valemont at the Grand Forum for further details and the location of the first clue. Your objective: uncover the truth behind these whispers, and secure this relic before it falls into the wrong hands.

title: The Outer Wall's Protection
body:
**Tower Authority — The Outer Wall's Protection**
*Tier: Escort | Expires: TBD | Reward: 150 EC + 100 Kharma*

Adventurers, the Tower Authority needs your help! Monstrous creatures have been relentlessly attacking the Outer Wall, putting our city at risk. Join Captain Havel Korin at the Grand Forum to defend the city's border and secure its safety.

*Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Grand Forum*

title: The Missing Artifact
body:
**Iron Fang Consortium — The Missing Artifact**
*Tier: local | Expires: TBD | Reward: 50 EC + 50 Kharma*

A valuable relic has gone missing from the Iron Fang Consortium's warehouse in the Outer Wall. The consortium suspects one of their members may have absconded with the artifact. Your mission is to retrieve the relic and bring the traitor to justice.

*Contact: Zakir, Outer Wall Warehouses*

title: The Relic Hunter's Den
body:
**Obsidian Lotus — The Relic Hunter's Den**
*Tier: Rift | Expires: TBD | Reward: 100 EC + 100 Kharma*

Uncover and disrupt a clandestine operation run by the Obsidian Lotus in the Outer Wall. The black market is dealing in dangerous relics that threaten the stability of our city. Contact: The Widow, Outer Wall Hideout. Be prepared for unexpected encounters and the potential for reality-altering perils.

title: Whispers of the Divine Forge
body:
**Serpent Choir — Whispers of the Divine Forge**
*Tier: Investigation | Expires: TBD | Reward: 50 EC, 100 Kharma*

A high-ranking member of the Serpent Choir, Yzura's Whisper, has reached out to you, Boxxo. Her message is urgent and cryptic: "The Divine Forge stirs, and I sense the hand of an old enemy. Meet me at the Sanctum Quarter's forge, under the bronze bell at midnight." Yzura seeks your unique insight to uncover the truth behind this ominous development.

title: The Missing Courier
body:
**Iron Fang Consortium — The Missing Courier**
*Tier: Local | Expires: TBD | Reward: 50 EC + 20 Kharma*

A valuable package is missing after a recent delivery to the Markets Infinite. The Iron Fang Consortium needs you to locate the missing courier and retrieve the package. Speak with Senior Agent Alistair at the Iron Fang Hideout in the Grand Forum for details and compensation. Good luck, adventurer.

title: City Under Fire
body:
**Wardens of Ash — City Under Fire**
*Tier: Rift | Expires: TBD | Reward: 300 EC + 500 Kharma*

Assist Captain Havel Korin in repelling a sudden attack on the city's defenses by an unknown enemy. The Outer Wall has been breached, and it's up to you to drive the invaders back and secure the city.

*Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Outer Wall Gate 12*

title: Warrens Purge
body:
**Patchwork Saints — Warrens Purge**
*Tier: Local | Expires: 7 days | Reward: 50 EC + 20 Kharma*

Join the Patchwork Saints in a crucial mission to clean and secure the dangerous 'Alley of the Lost Souls' in the Warrens. The area has been overrun by a rival gang, and it's time to reclaim it. Meet with Captain Eogan at the Hideaway on the corner of Crooked Alley and Shadow's Breath.

title: Shattered Symphony
body:
**Glass Sigil — Shattered Symphony**
*Tier: Escort | Expires: TBD | Reward: 80 EC + 50 Kharma*

Join Senior Archivist Pell at Grand Forum as you escort a valuable manuscript to the Guild of Ashen Scrolls. The text contains a lost arcane formula that could revolutionize Undercity magic. With rifts tearing reality across the city, protect the document and its carrier at all costs.

*Contact: Senior Archivist Pell, Grand Forum*

title: Shadows' Embrace
body:
**Iron Fang Consortium — Shadows' Embrace**
*Tier: Escort | Expires: TBD | Reward: 200 EC + 50 Kharma*

A valuable cargo shipment is headed to the Grand Forum, but the Outer Wall remains a dangerous passage due to recent Rift activity. The Iron Fang Consortium needs a team of capable adventurers to escort the shipment through the dangerous terrain and ensure it reaches its destination safely.

*Contact: Thoren, Sanctum Quarter*

title: Arcane Archives: Lost Knowledge Recovery
body:
**Glass Sigil — Arcane Archives: Lost Knowledge Recovery**
*Tier: Escort | Expires: TBD | Reward: 100 EC + 100 Kharma*

Assist Senior Archivist Pell in recovering lost knowledge from the Guild Spires' archives. As the Glass Sigil's resources are depleted, the Arcane Archives' contents are crucial to our survival.

*Contact: Senior Archivist Pell, Guild Spires*

title: Vanquished Valor
body:
**Argent Blades — Vanquished Valor**
*Tier: local | Expires: TBD | Reward: 35 EC + 10 Kharma*

A valiant knight of the Argent Blades has gone missing in the Outer Wall district. Lord Commander Thoren Ironheart has enlisted your help to locate him. He was last seen in the Company's Barracks, but fear of a rival faction's interference may have led to his disappearance.

*Contact: Lord Commander Thoren Ironheart, Argent Blades Barracks, Outer Wall*

title: Citywide Hunt
body:
**Iron Fang Consortium — Citywide Hunt**
*Tier: Escort | Expires: TBD | Reward: 100 EC + 50 Kharma*

Join the Iron Fang Consortium in a citywide manhunt for a notorious thief who has been targeting guild members across the Undercity. Serrik Dhal seeks assistance in locating this elusive criminal before they can strike again.

*Contact: Serrik Dhal, Guild Spires*

title: Warrens' Whispers
body:
**Patchwork Saints & Wardens of Ash — Warrens' Whispers**
*Tier: Local | Expires: TBD | Reward: 50 EC + 100 Kharma*

Investigate the haunting ghost stories plaguing The Warrens and uncover the source of the disturbance. Speak with Captain Havel Korin of the Wardens of Ash and Patchwork Saints for guidance. The Warrens, near the Outer Wall.

*Contact: Captain Havel Korin, The Warrens*

title: The Warrens' Stand
body:
**Patchwork Saints — The Warrens' Stand**
*Tier: Escort | Expires: TBD | Reward: 100 EC + 100 Kharma*

The Warrens' Warren, the heart of the city's most vulnerable district, is under threat. Development crews have been sighted encroaching on its borders, seeking to expand into the Warrens. Our mission is to protect the Warren's Warren, rallying support from the local populace.

*Contact: Captain Giselle, The Warrens' Warren*

title: Missing Scribe
body:
**Glass Sigil — Missing Scribe**
*Tier: Local | Expires: TBD | Reward: 50 EC*

The Arcane Archivist, Pell, requires your assistance. A young scribe, Aelor, has gone missing from the Glass Sigil's inner sanctum. Your objective is to find him within the Guild Spires.

*Contact: Archivist Pell, Glass Sigil*

title: Iron Fang Infiltration
body:
**Tower Authority/FTA — Iron Fang Infiltration**
*Tier: Tower | Expires: TBD | Reward: 100 EC + 50 Kharma*

Infiltrate the Iron Fang Consortium and gather evidence for a citywide crackdown on illicit activities. Speak with Director Myra Kess at the Tower Authority for your mission briefing.

*Contact: Director Myra Kess, Tower Authority*

title: The Prophecy of the Fallen Star
body:
**Guild of Ashen Scrolls — The Prophecy of the Fallen Star**
*Tier: Investigation | Expires: TBD | Reward: 125 EC + 30 Kharma*

Uncover the hidden prophecy that promises a path to power and salvation. Gather at the Market Infinite's "Crystal Eye" stall in the heart of the Market Infinite. Senior Archivist Pell awaits your arrival with a cryptic riddle and a trail of clues that could change the fate of the Undercity.

*Contact: Senior Archivist Pell, "Crystal Eye" stall, Market Infinite*

title: The Guild Spires Incursion
body:
**Obsidian Lotus — The Guild Spires Incursion**
*Tier: Inter-guild | Expires: TBD | Reward: 150 EC + 50 Kharma*

Infiltrate the Guild Spires and retrieve rare arcane materials needed for a powerful ritual, under the watchful eye of Senior Archivist Pell. The materials are hidden in a restricted section, and stealth will be crucial to avoid detection. Your contact is Archivist Elara, in the Warrens' Silver Bazaar. Be prepared for a dangerous journey through the heart of the city.

*Contact: Archivist Elara, Warrens' Silver Bazaar*

title: Defend Lady Cerys Valemont
body:
**Argent Blades — Defend Lady Cerys Valemont**
*Tier: Escort | Expires: TBD | Reward: 100 EC + 50 Kharma*

Join the Argent Blades in the Grand Forum's Arena of Words, where Lady Cerys Valemont faces the Serpent Choir's High Apostle Yzura in a public debate. Your mission is to ensure the safety of Lady Cerys, as tempers run high and tensions escalate.

Contact: Argent Blades Recruiter, Grand Forum's South Gate

title: Smuggler's Den Infiltration
body:
**Iron Fang Consortium — Smuggler's Den Infiltration**
*Tier: Escort | Expires: TBD | Reward: 120 EC + 50 Kharma*

Secure a hidden stash of smuggled artifacts from the Outer Wall's shadow markets before the Wardens of Ash uncover the contraband. The Iron Fang Consortium needs a team to sneak into the "Raven's Perch" hideout, retrieve the goods, and escape undetected.

*Contact: Serrik Dhal, The Outer Wall (near the Broken Arch)*

title: The Shadow's Edge
body:
**Wardens of Ash — The Shadow's Edge**
*Tier: inter-guild | Expires: TBD | Reward: 150 EC + 50 Kharma*

Uncover the Argent Blades' plans for the Shadow's Edge district. Infiltrate their ranks and gather intel on their upcoming operation. Meet with Captain Havel Korin in the Wardens' HQ at Sanctum Quarter for your mission briefing.

*Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Sanctum Quarter*

title: The Warrens Watch
body:
**Wardens of Ash — The Warrens Watch**
*Tier: Local | Expires: TBD | Reward: 50 EC + 50 Kharma*

In light of recent rift activity in the Warrens, the Wardens of Ash require your assistance in a district sweep to check on a suspicious location. Report to Captain Havel Korin at the Outer Wall barracks for a briefing and assignment. Your objective is to assess the area, investigate any signs of rift activity, and ensure the safety of nearby citizens. Be on the lookout for any unusual phenomena or unauthorized presence.

title: The Eyes of the Serpent
body:
**Glass Sigil — The Eyes of the Serpent**
*Tier: Epic | Expires: TBD | Reward: 1000 EC + 500 Kharma*

Rumors swirl of a secretive High Apostle Yzura gathering relics for a mysterious ritual within the Warrens. Infiltrate the Serpent Choir's stronghold and retrieve their sacred artifacts before they can be used.

*Contact: Senior Archivist Pell, Guild Spires*

title: Shadows in Sanctum
body:
**Wardens of Ash — Shadows in Sanctum**
*Tier: Investigation | Expires: TBD | Reward: 100 EC + 50 Kharma*

Investigate a series of mysterious disappearances within Sanctum Quarter, believed to be linked to the Obsidian Lotus' illicit dealings. Captain Havel Korin requests your aid to uncover the truth behind these disturbing events.

*Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Sanctum Quarter Watchtower*

title: Echoes of the Divine
body:
**Argent Blades — Echoes of the Divine**
*Tier: Epic | Expires: TBD | Reward: 1500 EC + 500 Kharma*

Join the Argent Blades in a desperate attempt to mend the Tower of Last Chance, shattered by the wrath of a fallen god. The Tower's fractured fragments are scattered across the city, their restoration crucial to maintaining the Undercity's fragile equilibrium.

*Contact: Lady Cerys Valemont, Grand Forum*

title: The Vanishing Sanctum
body:
**Wardens of Ash — The Vanishing Sanctum**
*Tier: Investigation | Expires: TBD | Reward: 150 EC + 100 Kharma*

A string of inexplicable disappearances has rattled the tranquility of Sanctum Quarter. The Wardens of Ash suspect the Obsidian Lotus is manipulating their illicit operations, and they need your help to confirm their suspicions. Report to Captain Havel Korin at the Sanctum Quarter Watchtower for your mission briefing.

*Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Sanctum Quarter Watchtower*

title: The Hollow Vault
body:
**Iron Fang Consortium — The Hollow Vault**
*Tier: Dungeon | Expires: TBD | Reward: 200 EC + 100 Kharma*

Deep within the heart of the Warrens, a once-mighty vault sealed long ago has been discovered. The Iron Fang Consortium seeks a team of brave adventurers to explore this relic, rumored to contain valuable artifacts and ancient secrets. Contact Senior Archivist Pell at the Guild Spires for further information and to claim your place in the expedition.

title: Deciphering the Lost Prophecies
faction: Guild of Ashen Scrolls & Adventurers Guild
body:
**Guild of Ashen Scrolls & Adventurers Guild — Deciphering the Lost Prophecies**
*Tier: Investigation | Expires: TBD | Reward: 100 EC + 75 Kharma*

Join forces with the Guild of Ashen Scrolls to decipher ancient prophecies hidden in the city's ruins, rumored to foretell a major event. The prophecies are said to be concealed within the shattered remains of the Temple of the Fallen Stars, located deep within the Outer Wall. Contact: Mari Fen, Guild Spires.

title: Echoes of the Divine: The Reckoning
body:
**Argent Blades — Echoes of the Divine: The Reckoning**
*Tier: Epic | Expires: TBD | Reward: 1000 EC + 200 Kharma + Legend Points*

Seek the Argent Blades' Champion in the Grand Forum, who claims a god of battle has returned to the Undercity. Investigate and prepare for a showdown to save the city from the divine wrath. The fate of the Undercity rests on your shoulders.

*Contact: Captain Cerys Valemont, Grand Forum*

title: The Veiled Path
body:
**Serpent Choir — The Veiled Path**
*Tier: Escort | Expires: TBD | Reward: 150 EC + 100 Kharma*

Protect High Apostle Yzura as she travels through the treacherous Outer Wall on a secret mission. Rumors abound of rival factions trying to intercept her. Meet Yzura at the Sanctum Quarter's Shrine of Light at sunrise. Successful completion will earn your favor with the divine Choir.

title: The Veiled Informant
body:
**Patchwork Saints — The Veiled Informant**
*Tier: Escort | Expires: TBD | Reward: 50 EC + 100 Kharma*

Following the recent uncovering of a dangerous new threat to the Undercity, a key informant with vital information has gone into hiding in the Warrens. You are tasked with guarding them from rival factions who may seek to silence them.

*Contact: Kyrra "Rat's-Eye" Denn, The Warrens - Hollow's Patch*

title: The Shadows' Haul
body:
**Iron Fang Consortium — The Shadows' Haul**
*Tier: Escort | Expires: 30 days | Reward: 120 EC + 50 Kharma*

Secure a cache of smuggled artifacts from the Outer Wall's shadow markets before the Wardens of Ash uncover the contraband. Contact: Zevran Valeris, The Shambles. You'll be accompanying a caravan led by Serrik Dhal himself. This job requires cunning and stealth to keep the goods safe.

title: Sweep the Hollow Way
body:
**The Wardens of Ash — Sweep the Hollow Way**
*Tier: Local | Expires: TBD | Reward: 30 EC + 10 Kharma*

Join Captain Havel Korin and his team in a patrol sweep of the Hollow Way. Reports of increased criminal activity in the area have raised concerns. Your task is to secure the district and ensure the safety of its residents. Meet Captain Havel Korin at the Guard House in Grand Forum.

title: Debate of Words
body:
**Argent Blades — Debate of Words**
*Tier: Escort | Expires: TBD | Reward: 120 EC + 50 Kharma*

Defend Lady Cerys Valemont in a public debate against the Serpent Choir's High Apostle Yzura, in the Grand Forum's Arena of Words. As a renowned Argent Blade, your skills in debate and martial prowess will be put to the test. Lady Cerys seeks your protection amidst a tense confrontation, set to ignite the city's faith in the days to come.

*Contact: Mari Fen, Adventurers Guild*

title: Whispers of Celestial Bond
body:
**Argent Blades — Whispers of Celestial Bond**
*Tier: Divine | Expires: TBD | Reward: 300 EC + 50 Kharma*

Boxxo, your unique gifts have caught the attention of Lady Cerys Valemont. She requests your presence in the Grand Forum. It appears a divine thread weaves through your soul, and the Argent Blades believe it may be connected to a celestial artifact rumored to be hidden within the city. Investigate this connection and retrieve the artifact if it exists. Be warned, the Serpent Choir and the Widow's Obsidian Lotus may also be after it.

Contact: Lady Cerys Valemont, Grand Forum

title: Whispers of Divine Intrusion
body:
**Guild of Ashen Scrolls — Whispers of Divine Intrusion**
*Tier: Investigation | Expires: TBD | Reward: 100 EC + 100 Kharma*

Investigate the growing influence of the Serpent Choir in the Sanctum Quarter, as rumors of dark rituals and divine contracts stir unrest among the citizenry. Eir Velan, a Senior Archivist, requires your assistance to uncover the truth behind these disturbing reports.

*Contact: Eir Velan, Guild Spires*

title: The Hollow Vault
body:
**Iron Fang Consortium — The Hollow Vault**
*Tier: Rift | Expires: TBD | Reward: 200 EC + 100 Kharma*

Delve into the ancient vault beneath the Warrens known as the Hollow Vault. Rumors persist of a relic of immense power hidden deep within, and the Iron Fang Consortium is willing to pay top coin for its recovery. The vault lies open due to a recent Rift, and the area is dangerous, even for experienced adventurers.

*Contact: Serrik Dhal, Iron Fang Consortium Headquarters, Grand Forum*

title: The Stolen Divine
body:
**Serpent Choir — The Stolen Divine**
*Tier: Divine | Expires: TBD | Reward: 200 EC + 500 Kharma*

High Apostle Yzura requires your assistance in retrieving a stolen divine relic from the Patchwork Saints' protection in the Warrens. It is believed to have been taken by a rogue member seeking power. Proceed with caution; the Saints will not take kindly to intruders.

*Contact: High Apostle Yzura, Sanctum Quarter*

title: The Missing Relic
body:
**Iron Fang Consortium — The Missing Relic**
*Tier: Investigation | Expires: TBD | Reward: 100 EC + 50 Kharma*

In the heart of the Warrens, the Patchwork Saints have reported a missing relic of immense value to the Iron Fang Consortium. The last known location was the infamous Blade's End tavern. You are tasked with finding the relic and returning it to the Consortium's vault.

*Contact: Zoran, Blade's End, Warrens*

title: Shadows of the Outer Wall
body:
**Iron Fang Consortium — Shadows of the Outer Wall**
*Tier: Escort | Expires: TBD | Reward: 75 EC + 50 Kharma*

The Iron Fang Consortium requires your assistance in securing a shipment of smuggled artifacts from the Outer Wall's shadow markets before the Wardens of Ash uncover the contraband. Your contact, Serrik Dhal, awaits you at the Market of Shadows, Outer Wall. Be cautious, the stakes are high and the competition fierce.

title: The Iron Tide Negotiation
body:
**Tower Authority — The Iron Tide Negotiation**
*Tier: Tower | Expires: TBD | Reward: 500 EC + 200 Kharma*

Assist the FTA in a high-stakes negotiation with the Iron Fang Consortium, to reach an agreement on the illegal trading of relics within the city. Meet with Director Myra Kess at Grand Forum for debriefing and strategic planning. Successful completion could potentially improve the city's safety and stability.

*Contact: Director Myra Kess, Grand Forum*

title: Divine Intervention
body:
**Serpent Choir — Divine Intervention**
*Tier: Investigation | Expires: 21 days | Reward: 75 EC + 100 Kharma*

Boxxo, your unique abilities are sought for a matter of utmost importance. Meet with High Apostle Yzura at the Sanctum Quarter, at the hour of twilight. She has a divine artifact in dire need of protection. Your expertise in the arcane, coupled with your Warforged constitution, make you the ideal candidate for this mission.

title: Sanctum Quarter's Silent Disappearances
body:
**The Wardens of Ash — Sanctum Quarter's Silent Disappearances**
*Tier: Investigation | Expires: TBD | Reward: 150 EC + 100 Kharma*

Investigate a series of mysterious disappearances within Sanctum Quarter, believed to be linked to the Obsidian Lotus' illicit dealings. Captain Havel Korin of the Wardens of Ash needs your help to uncover the truth behind these unsettling events.

*Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Wardens' Outpost, Sanctum Quarter*

title: The Warrens' Watchful Eye
body:
**Patchwork Saints — The Warrens' Watchful Eye**
*Tier: Escort | Expires: TBD | Reward: 120 EC + 50 Kharma*

The Patchwork Saints are in need of a capable guardian. A key informant in the Warrens holds vital information on a dangerous new threat to the city, and they need protection from rival factions. Be on the lookout for signs of trouble and ensure their safety.

*Contact: Elder Renn, Sanctum Quarter*

title: The Missing Gladiator's Emblem
body:
**Argent Blades — The Missing Gladiator's Emblem**
*Tier: Local | Expires: TBD | Reward: 50 EC*

A fellow gladiator, Aric Stormgrip, has gone missing. His prized emblem, the Crimson Thunder, is crucial for the upcoming arena event. Retrieve the emblem from the Warrens and return it to Lady Cerys Valemont in the Grand Forum.

*Contact: Lady Cerys Valemont, Grand Forum*

title: Whispers from the Shadows
body:
**Obsidian Lotus — Whispers from the Shadows**
*Tier: Investigation | Expires: TBD | Reward: 50 EC + 100 Kharma*

Ever since the latest rift in the Outer Wall, whispers of a mysterious figure lurking in the shadows have spread through the district. The Obsidian Lotus seeks an adventurer to investigate these rumors and uncover the truth behind the eerie presence.

*Contact: Eir Velan, Guild of Ashen Scrolls*

title: Shards of Dawn
body:
**Glass Sigil — Shards of Dawn**
*Tier: Standard | Expires: TBD | Reward: 100 EC + 50 Kharma*
*Opposes: None*

Protect the convoy of Archivist Pell as she transports the Shards of Dawn through the treacherous Outer Wall. An ancient artifact believed to hold the secrets of the city's founding, these shards are invaluable and must not fall into the wrong hands.

*Contact: Archivist Pell, Guild Spires*

title: The Outer Wall's Hidden Treasures
body:
**Iron Fang Consortium — The Outer Wall's Hidden Treasures**
*Tier: Standard | Expires: TBD | Reward: 50 EC + 50 Kharma*
*Opposes: Wardens of Ash*

An unverified tip claims a smuggler named "Ratskin" has a cache of Iron Fang artifacts hidden in the Outer Wall's shadow markets. We need you to secure these items before the Wardens of Ash uncover the contraband.

Contact: Ratskin, The Outer Wall - Shattered Marketplace.

title: The Stolen Relic
body:
**Serpent Choir — The Stolen Relic**
