*Tier: Divine | Expires: TBD | Reward: 150 EC + 200 Kharma*
*Opposes: Patchwork Saints*

A divine relic has been stolen from the Serpent Choir's sanctum. High Apostle Yzura suspects the Patchwork Saints' involvement and demands its retrieval. Prove your worth to the Serpent Choir by infiltrating the Warrens and recovering the stolen relic.

*Contact: Brother Voren, Sanctum Quarter*

title: The Stolen Divine
body:
**Serpent Choir — The Stolen Divine**
*Tier: Divine | Expires: TBD | Reward: 250 EC + 150 Kharma*
*Opposes: Patchwork Saints*

High Apostle Yzura has received a report of a stolen divine relic under the protection of the Patchwork Saints in the Warrens. Retrieve the relic and return it to the Serpent Choir.

Contact: High Apostle Yzura, Sanctum Quarter.

title: Missing Messenger
body:
**Patchwork Saints — Missing Messenger**
*Tier: Local | Expires: TBD | Reward: 20 EC*
*Opposes: None*

The Patchwork Saints are in need of a capable adventurer. A messenger delivering important documents to the Sanctum Quarter has gone missing, and they suspect foul play. Retrieve the missing documents from the last known location, if you can find them.

*Contact: Brother Jorick, The Warrens (at the Patchwork Saints' Hideout)*

title: The Warrens' Unyielding Veil
body:
**Iron Fang Consortium — The Warrens' Unyielding Veil**
*Tier: Rift | Expires: TBD | Reward: 120 EC + 50 Kharma*
*Opposes: None*

A rift in the Warrens, near the Outer Wall, threatens to engulf several key smuggling routes. Captain Serrik Dhal needs an experienced team to seal the rift before it disrupts business.

*Contact: Captain Serrik Dhal, Iron Fang Consortium Offices, Markets Infinite*

title: The Lost Lens
body:
**Glass Sigil — The Lost Lens**
*Tier: local | Expires: TBD | Reward: 15 EC + 5 Kharma*
*Opposes: None*

Investigate the disappearance of a valuable artifact—a rare, ancient lens—from the Grand Forum's Library. Speak with Senior Archivist Pell for details and any leads.

*Contact: Senior Archivist Pell, Glass Sigil Spire*

title: Debate of Shadows
body:
**Argent Blades — Debate of Shadows**
*Tier: Standard | Expires: TBD | Reward: 150 EC + 50 Kharma*
*Opposes: Serpent Choir*

Lady Cerys Valemont, the fearless leader of the Argent Blades, has been challenged to a public debate in the Grand Forum's Arena of Words by the High Apostle Yzura of the Serpent Choir. The debate will center around the future of the Undercity and its people. Defend Lady Cerys Valemont's honor and the Argent Blades' reputation against the Serpent Choir's influence.

*Contact: Lady Cerys Valemont, Argent Blades Training Hall*

title: The Shadow's Embrace
body:
**Wardens of Ash — The Shadow's Embrace**
*Tier: High-stakes | Expires: TBD | Reward: 1000 EC + 50 Kharma*
*Opposes: Obsidian Lotus*

Infiltrate the Obsidian Lotus' stronghold hidden within the Warrens and retrieve a mysterious artifact known as the Embrace of Shadows. This artifact is said to have the power to shift the balance of power in the Undercity, and it must not fall into the wrong hands.

*Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Sanctum Quarter*

title: The Iron Veil Agreement
body:
**Tower Authority — The Iron Veil Agreement**
*Tier: High-stakes | Expires: TBD | Reward: 150 EC + 100 Kharma*
*Opposes: Iron Fang Consortium*

Join Director Myra Kess in the Sanctum Quarter for a high-stakes negotiation with the Iron Fang Consortium to reach an agreement on their illegal trading of relics within the city. The future of the Undercity hangs in the balance, and your assistance is crucial to maintaining order.

*Contact: Director Myra Kess, Sanctum Quarter*

title: The Shattered Alliance
body:
**Glass Sigil — The Shattered Alliance**
*Tier: Inter-guild | Expires: TBD | Reward: 500 EC, 50 Kharma*
*Opposes: Wardens of Ash*

A powerful artifact, the Sapphire of Sorrow, has been stolen from the Glass Sigil archives. Rumors suggest the Wardens of Ash are behind the theft. Retrieve the artifact and bring it back to Senior Archivist Pell before they can use it against us.

*Contact: Senior Archivist Pell, Glass Sigil Archives, Sanctum Quarter*

title: Echoes of a Temporal Cataclysm
body:
**Wardens of Ash — Echoes of a Temporal Cataclysm**
*Tier: Escort | Expires: Day 15 | Reward: 150 EC, 150 Kharma*
*Opposes: None*

Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Sanctum Quarter

Eleanor Reed, your expertise in arcane matters is sought by the Wardens of Ash. A temporal anomaly has emerged in the Outer Wall, causing ripples in our city's timeline. Your task is to escort Captain Havel Korin to the site, stabilize the area, and uncover the cause of this temporal disturbance. Your understanding of cause and effect, as well as your proficiency in arcane arts, make you the ideal candidate for this mission.

title: Tome of Echoes Retrieval
body:
**Adventurers Guild — Tome of Echoes Retrieval**
*Tier: Escort | Expires: TBD | Reward: 100 EC + 50 Kharma*
*Opposes: Guild of Ashen Scrolls*

Delve into the shadowed heart of the Warrens to retrieve the ancient Tome of Echoes, a prized artifact currently in the hands of the Guild of Ashen Scrolls. This tome is sought by the Adventurers Guild for its arcane secrets and could tip the balance of power in the city.

*Contact: Mari Fen, Adventurers Guild Spire*

title: Warren's Wager
body:
**Adventurers Guild — Warren's Wager**
*Tier: Rift | Expires: TBD | Reward: 200 EC + 50 Kharma*
*Opposes: None*

Venture into the labyrinthine Warrens and unravel a series of riddles to claim hidden treasures. The Adventurers Guild offers a lucrative reward for those who can navigate this maze-like district and solve its enigmatic puzzles.

*Contact: Mari Fen, Guild Spires*

title: Sanctum's Sacrifice
body:
**Wardens of Ash — Sanctum's Sacrifice**
*Tier: Escort | Expires: TBD | Reward: 100 EC + 100 Kharma*
*Opposes: Serpent Choir*

Join forces with the Wardens of Ash to infiltrate the Sanctum Quarter and rescue a missing priestess from the clutches of a dangerous cult. Meet Captain Havel Korin at the Warrens' Gate of Echoes to begin your mission.

title: The Eye of Serrik Dhal
body:
**Glass Sigil — The Eye of Serrik Dhal**
*Tier: Inter-guild | Expires: TBD | Reward: 300 EC + 100 Kharma*
*Opposes: Iron Fang Consortium*

Uncover the Iron Fang Consortium's illicit dealings at the Eye of Serrik Dhal, a hidden relic warehouse deep within the Warrens. Gather evidence to expose their criminal activities and thwart their plans to expand their influence.

Contact: Archivist Pell, Sanctum Quarter Library

title: Echoes of the Forgotten Rift
body:
**Wizards Tower — Echoes of the Forgotten Rift**
*Tier: Investigation | Expires: 25 days | Reward: 200 EC + 50 Kharma*
*Opposes: None*

*Contact: Senior Archivist Pell, Wizards Tower*

Eleanor Reed, your unique talents are required for an investigation. The Tower has discovered an ancient tome, believed to contain powerful arcane secrets. The catch? It's hidden within a Rift that's formed in the Warrens. Your familiarity with the School of Witchcraft and Rifts makes you the ideal candidate to retrieve this valuable artifact. Be cautious, as the Rift is unstable and its location is constantly shifting. Good luck, Eleanor.

title: Suspicious Sweep
body:
**Wardens of Ash — Suspicious Sweep**
*Tier: Local | Expires: TBD | Reward: 30 EC + 50 Kharma*
*Opposes: None*

The Wardens of Ash require your assistance in a district sweep. Reports of strange activity near the Outer Wall have been on the rise, and Captain Havel Korin wants the area checked thoroughly. Meet with him at the Watchtower to discuss the specifics and receive your orders.

*Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Watchtower, Outer Wall*

title: Tower's Task
body:
**Tower Authority — Tower's Task**
*Tier: Tower | Expires: TBD | Reward: 150 EC + 100 Kharma*
*Opposes: None*

Unravel the secrets within the Wizards Tower and assist Director Myra Kess in an investigation of the Tower Authority. Uncover corruption within the FTA and restore faith in the system.

Contact: Senior Archivist Pell, Wizards Tower

title: The Forgotten Vanguard
body:
**Argent Blades — The Forgotten Vanguard**
*Tier: Investigation | Expires: TBD | Reward: 125 EC + 100 Kharma*
*Opposes: Serpent Choir*

A fabled hero from the past, the Vanguard, has resurfaced in the Warrens. The Argent Blades seek to capitalize on their return, but the trail has gone cold. Your Aether-Touched abilities and understanding of the Ethereal Plane make you the ideal candidate to rekindle the hunt.

Contact: Elder Valerion, Sanctum Quarter

Investigate the reported sightings of the Vanguard in the Warrens, and gather information on their intentions. The Argent Blades believe that the Serpent Choir may be involved, and you must determine their role, if any. Use your ethereal abilities to follow the trail through the planes if necessary. Time is of the essence, and success could bring great rewards.

title: The Abandoned Vault
body:
**Wardens of Ash — The Abandoned Vault**
*Tier: Rift | Expires: TBD | Reward: 120 EC + 100 Kharma*
*Opposes: None*

Delve into the abandoned Vault of the Sorrowful Sire, a sealed vault deep within the Warrens. The Warden Havel Korin believes ancient artifacts are being misused by the Obsidian Lotus. Your mission is to retrieve any incriminating evidence and secure the vault.

*Contact: Warden Havel Korin, Sanctum Quarter*

title: The Grand Arena's Champion's Challenge
body:
**Argent Blades — The Grand Arena's Champion's Challenge**
*Tier: High-stakes | Expires: TBD | Reward: 300 EC + 100 Kharma*
*Opposes: None*

Compete in the Grand Arena for the prestigious title of the Argent Blades' Champion. Prove your mettle in a series of intense, single combat duels against the city's best warriors, under the watchful eye of Lady Cerys Valemont. The winner takes all.

*Contact: Rivalus Daxon, Grand Forum Arena*

title: The Ethereal Calling
body:
**Patchwork Saints — The Ethereal Calling**
*Tier: Local | Expires: 5 days | Reward: 50 EC + 20 Kharma*
*Opposes: None*

*Contact: Taelis Nighteye, The Warrens (North Side)*

The Warrens' oldest wardens have summoned you, Keta Fadeworth. A troubling recurrence of otherworldly echoes has plagued the district, and they fear it may be tied to your kind's ethereal affinity. Investigate these hauntings, and uncover any hidden connections to the Aether-Touched. Your guidance is urgently sought to unravel this mystery.

title: The Poisonous Pulse
body:
**Obsidian Lotus — The Poisonous Pulse**
*Tier: Investigation | Expires: TBD | Reward: 150 EC*
*Opposes: None*

Investigate the source of a new drug, The Poisonous Pulse, causing chaos in the Warrens. Speak with Senior Inquisitor Valtor Valyria at the Serpent Choir's Sanctum Quarter headquarters for information and leads. Be warned, this drug is dangerous and you may find yourself in a web of deceit and corruption.

title: The Forbidden Codex
body:
**Wizards Tower — The Forbidden Codex**
*Tier: Tower | Expires: TBD | Reward: 100 EC + 50 Kharma*
*Opposes: None*

Assist Archmage Yaulderna Silverstreak in the deciphering of a powerful arcane tome, rumored to contain secrets that could shift the balance of power within the Undercity.

*Contact: Archmage Yaulderna Silverstreak, Wizards Tower*

title: Missing Courier
body:
**Patchwork Saints — Missing Courier**
*Tier: Local | Expires: TBD | Reward: 25 EC + 10 Kharma*
*Opposes: None*

A messenger from the Warrens has gone missing while delivering a sensitive document to a client in Guild Spires. The Patchwork Saints need you to find the courier and the document before it falls into the wrong hands.

*Contact: Kaelis, The Warrens (underneath the Outer Wall)*

title: Echoes of a Forbidden Past
body:
**Wizards Tower — Echoes of a Forbidden Past**
*Tier: Investigation | Expires: One moon's cycle | Reward: 100 EC + 50 Kharma*
*Opposes: Serpent Choir*

Eleanor Reed, your arcane prowess and unwavering neutrality have been noted by the Wizards Tower. An artifact of immense power, long lost to the annals of time, has resurfaced in the hands of the Serpent Choir. They wish to twist its power to their own ends, and it is our duty to ensure this does not come to pass.

*Contact: Senior Archivist Pell, Wizards Tower*

title: The Warrens' Tear
body:
**Wardens of Ash — The Warrens' Tear**
*Tier: Rift | Expires: TBD | Reward: 250 EC + 100 Kharma*
*Opposes: None*

A rift has opened in the heart of the Warrens, a tear that has grown for days. The Wardens of Ash are seeking a team of brave adventurers to venture into the chaos and seal the breach before it threatens the safety of the entire city.

*Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Sanctum Quarter*

title: Echoes of the Past Revisited
body:
**Argent Blades — Echoes of the Past Revisited**
*Tier: Escort | Expires: TBD | Reward: 150 EC + 50 Kharma*
*Opposes: None*

*Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Outer Wall Gate 5*

Korin has an unusual request for you, Owlin warrior S'kree. It seems he's discovered an ancient relic from the days of the Great War, and he believes it holds information that could be vital to the defense of the Undercity. He wants you to escort it to the Wizards Tower for analysis. The relic is located within the Warrens near the Ragged Maze. Be careful, as the Warrens can be treacherous, and the relic is valuable to many who would seek to claim it for their own. Your mission is to protect it at all costs, and see that it reaches the Wizards Tower safely.

title: Echoes of the Forgotten
body:
**Argent Blades — Echoes of the Forgotten**
*Tier: Investigation | Expires: TBD | Reward: 120 EC + 50 Kharma*
*Opposes: None*

Investigate a missing nobleman last seen in the Grand Forum. The noble, Lord Adelric, has vanished without a trace, and his absence is causing a stir among the high society. The trail leads back to the Grand Forum, but the noble district's security is tight. Tread carefully.

*Contact: Lady Cerys Valemont, Argent Blades headquarters, Sanctum Quarter*

title: The Deceitful Sparrowthief
reward: 50 EC + Access to Glass Sigil's hidden archive
body:
**Glass Sigil — The Deceitful Sparrowthief**
*Tier: investigation | Expires: 7 days | Reward: 50 EC + Access to Glass Sigil's hidden archive*
*Opposes: None*

Rumors of a doppelganger impersonating the late Jorick Sparrowthief have been circulating in the Undercity's dark corners. The sightings have been chilling, with the imposter lurking in familiar haunts – the Crooked Spindle and the Duskwatch Bridge. Your mission, should you choose to accept it: unmask the deceiver and bring them to justice.

*Contact: Elara Swiftfoot, the Crooked Spindle – Duskwatch Ward, 9pm*

title: The Warrens' Ward
body:
**Patchwork Saints — The Warrens' Ward**
*Tier: Patrol | Expires: TBD | Reward: 150 EC + 50 Kharma*
*Opposes: Obsidian Lotus*

After a recent raid, the Patchwork Saints have discovered a hidden Obsidian Lotus cache near the Warrens' northernmost alleyways. The Saints need a team to guard this location and prevent the Black Market from reclaiming their stolen goods.

*Contact: Mara, the Warrens' Watchtower*

title: The Broken Vow
body:
**Glass Sigil — The Broken Vow**
*Tier: inter-guild | Expires: TBD | Reward: 250 EC + 50 Kharma*
*Opposes: Iron Fang Consortium*

Recent intelligence suggests the Iron Fang Consortium has obtained a rare and powerful artifact. You must retrieve it before they can use it against us. The artifact is hidden within the Iron Fang's stronghold, located deep within the Outer Wall. Infiltrate their ranks, gain the artifact, and bring it back to Glass Sigil.

Contact: Senior Archivist Pell, Sanctum Quarter.

title: The Ethereal Echoes Return
body:
**Patchwork Saints — The Ethereal Echoes Return**
*Tier: Local | Expires: 7 days | Reward: 50 EC, 50 Kharma*
*Opposes: None*

*Contact: Marnis "Thorn-Eye", The Warrens, by the Iron Fang Consortium Market entrance*

Keta Fadeworth, your reputation as an Aether-Touched Artificer has reached the Patchwork Saints. We have been tracking an ethereal disturbance in the Warrens, the source of which seems to be tied to your past. Marnis Thorn-Eye, our chief of the Warrens watch, needs your assistance to uncover what lies beneath this eerie echo.

title: The Unseen Saboteur
body:
**Wardens of Ash — The Unseen Saboteur**
*Tier: High-stakes | Expires: TBD | Reward: 200 EC + 100 Kharma*
*Opposes: Obsidian Lotus*

Infiltrate the Black Market and root out a traitor among us. The Widow's operation has been compromised, and sabotage is suspected to be the work of the Obsidian Lotus. You are to find and apprehend the spy responsible.

*Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Sanctum Quarter*

title: The Shadows of the Warrens
body:
**Wardens of Ash — The Shadows of the Warrens**
*Tier: Local | Expires: TBD | Reward: 35 EC + 10 Kharma*
*Opposes: None*

A recent spate of disappearances has the Wardens of Ash concerned. The most recent was reported in the Warrens, an area notoriously prone to shady dealings and unseen dangers. Your task is to sweep the area, identify any signs of unusual activity, and report back to Captain Havel Korin at the Watchtower. Keep your eyes open for any signs of the Obsidian Lotus or Serpent Choir interfering in the neighborhood.

*Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Watchtower*

title: The Echo of Eternity
body:
**Wizards Tower — The Echo of Eternity**
*Tier: Epic | Expires: TBD | Reward: 1200 EC + 100 Kharma + 10 LP*
*Opposes: Serpent Choir*

The arcane academy has called for your assistance. Archmage Yaulderna Silverstreak seeks a team to investigate an ancient artifact rumored to contain the echo of a fallen god. This relic has resurfaced in the Outer Wall and the Wizards Tower fears it may fall into the wrong hands, specifically those of the Serpent Choir.

*Contact: Archmage Yaulderna Silverstreak, Wizards Tower*

title: The Veil of Ages
body:
**Wardens of Ash — The Veil of Ages**
*Tier: Epic | Expires: TBD | Reward: 1000 EC + 1000 Kharma*
*Opposes: None*

The ancient guardians of the Undercity believe the Tower of Last Chance is under threat by a long-forgotten enemy. You are sought to investigate a series of seismic shifts near the Outer Wall, believed to be the first signs of an ancient god attempting to break free from its prison deep beneath the city.

*Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Sanctum Quarter*

title: Silvered Blade Trials
body:
**Argent Blades — Silvered Blade Trials**
*Tier: Escort | Expires: 30 days | Reward: 150 EC + 100 Kharma*
*Opposes: None*

Prove your mettle in the Argent Blades' prestigious combat tournament, held in the Grand Forum this season. Seek out the Argent Blades' Captain, Marisia D'Alessandro, in the Grand Forum to sign up for the trials. Survive grueling rounds of competition to claim the Silvered Blade, a symbol of unmatched combat prowess and a substantial prize purse.

title: The Crown's Balance
body:
**Wardens of Ash — The Crown's Balance**
*Tier: Escort | Expires: 21 Days | Reward: 150 EC + 50 Kharma*
*Opposes: Serpent Choir*

*Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Outer Wall Gatehouse*

A farm girl turned Warrior of the Leaden Crown, Lammis, your skills and unique abilities have caught the attention of Captain Havel Korin. The Wardens of Ash are in need of a powerful presence to ensure the safety of a valuable cargo shipment. The Serpent Choir is rumored to be planning an attack on the convoy, and only someone with Lammis's prowess can tip the balance in the Wardens' favor. If you accept this mission, you will be tasked with escorting the convoy from the Outer Wall to the Sanctum Quarter. Your luck may prove invaluable in this high-stakes operation.

title: Yaulderna's Conundrum
body:
**Wizards Tower — Yaulderna's Conundrum**
*Tier: Epic | Expires: TBD | Reward: 150 EC + 50 Kharma*
*Opposes: None*

Assist Archmage Yaulderna Silverstreak in deciphering an arcane artifact, said to hold the key to unlocking the city's hidden potential. Meet with the Archmage in the Wizards Tower for a private audience.

*Contact: Archmage Yaulderna Silverstreak, Wizards Tower*

title: The Shifting Shadows
body:
**Wardens of Ash — The Shifting Shadows**
*Tier: Local | Expires: TBD | Reward: 50 EC + 10 Kharma*
*Opposes: None*

Following reports of an unusual activity in the Outer Wall district, Captain Havel Korin requests a routine patrol to investigate the area. The primary concern is a suspicious structure that has been showing odd magical signs. Proceed with caution, as it may be connected to a rift.

*Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Outer Wall Watchtower*

title: The Hidden Key
body:
**Wizards Tower — The Hidden Key**
*Tier: Epic | Expires: TBD | Reward: 200 EC + 150 Kharma + 5 LP*
*Opposes: None*

Join Archmage Yaulderna Silverstreak in unraveling the secrets of an ancient artifact, rumored to hold the key to unlocking the Undercity's hidden potential. Meet the Archmage at the Tower of Last Chance, in the Grand Forum.

title: Towering Betrayal
body:
**Tower Authority — Towering Betrayal**
*Tier: Tower | Expires: TBD | Reward: 150 EC + 50 Kharma*
*Opposes: Argent Blades*

Infiltrate the Tower Authority and uncover Director Myra Kess's secret dealings with the Argent Blades, potentially putting the city's peace at risk. Contact: Mari Fen, Adventurers Guild.

title: The Warren's Breach
body:
**Wardens of Ash — The Warren's Breach**
*Tier: Rift | Expires: TBD | Reward: 200 EC + 100 Kharma*
*Opposes: None*

A rift has torn the heart of the Warrens, threatening its inhabitants and the stability of the district. The Warden's Captain Havel Korin seeks brave adventurers to repair the breach before it grows more dangerous.

*Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Sanctum Quarter*

title: The Test of the Leaden Crown
body:
**Argent Blades — The Test of the Leaden Crown**
*Tier: Escort | Expires: TBD | Reward: 100 EC + 50 Kharma*
*Opposes: Serpent Choir*

Lammis, the Warrior of the Leaden Crown, we call upon you. Lady Cerys Valemont, the fearless leader of the Argent Blades, has a request for your unmatched skills. She seeks a champion to escort her emissary to the Sanctum Quarter for a crucial meeting with the High Apostle Yzura of the Serpent Choir. Recent tensions between our factions make this a dangerous journey, and the Lady believes your prowess and luck will keep the emissary safe.

Contact: Lady Cerys Valemont, Grand Forum (Outer Wall Entrance)

Your objective is to escort Lady Cerys's emissary to the Sanctum Quarter and ensure a peaceful meeting with the High Apostle Yzura. Success will strengthen the Argent Blades' reputation and possibly lead to valuable rewards. Failure may further inflame the already strained relations between our factions. Proceed with caution.

title: The Broken Pact
body:
**Patchwork Saints — The Broken Pact**
*Tier: Escort | Expires: TBD | Reward: 75 EC + 50 Kharma*
*Opposes: Obsidian Lotus*

The Patchwork Saints have been granted a contract to protect a prominent Warrens merchant and his valuable cargo from the clutches of the Obsidian Lotus. Escort Kaelan Swiftwind and his caravan from the Warren's Gate to the Outer Wall checkpoint without incident.

*Contact: Sergent Zara, Warren's Gate*

title: The Tower's Shadow
body:
**Wardens of Ash — The Tower's Shadow**
*Tier: Towering Betrayal | Expires: TBD | Reward: 150 EC + 100 Kharma*
*Opposes: Argent Blades*

Infiltrate the Tower Authority and uncover Director Myra Kess's secret dealings with the Argent Blades, potentially putting the city's peace at risk. Be warned, tensions run high between these factions, and your cover may be tested.

Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Sanctum Quarter.

title: Dark Revelations
body:
**Glass Sigil — Dark Revelations**
*Tier: Investigation | Expires: TBD | Reward: 150 EC + 100 Kharma*
*Opposes: Serpent Choir*

Investigate strange occurrences in the Warrens, rumored to be connected to High Apostle Yzura's divine power, unnerving the populace. Speak with Senior Archivist Pell at the Glass Sigil headquarters in the Guild Spires for further details.

*Contact: Senior Archivist Pell, Glass Sigil Headquarters*

title: The Shattered Mirror
body:
**Glass Sigil — The Shattered Mirror**
*Tier: Epic | Expires: TBD | Reward: 500 EC + 500 Kharma + 5 LP*
*Opposes: Obsidian Lotus*

Deep in the Outer Wall, the Widow's stronghold is under attack by the Obsidian Lotus. The Glass Sigil requests your assistance in retaking it and uncovering the secrets hidden within.

*Contact: Senior Archivist Pell, Glass Sigil Archive*

title: The Crown's Balance (Restored)
body:
**Wardens of Ash — The Crown's Balance (Restored)**
*Tier: Escort / Standard | Expires: 21 days | Reward: 100 EC + 20 Kharma*
*Opposes: None*

*Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Grand Forum*

Captain Havel Korin, leader of the Wardens of Ash, requests your services. He believes the Unforgiven Crown, an artifact of great power and dark history, has been disturbed. The Crown was once in your possession and you were its most formidable guardian. The Wardens need someone with your unique abilities to restore the Crown's Balance. Escort the Crown to the Warden's Sanctum Quarter stronghold without incident. The Crown's Balance must be maintained, Lammis.

title: The Warren's Ward
body:
**Patchwork Saints — The Warren's Ward**
*Tier: Escort | Expires: TBD | Reward: 100 EC + 100 Kharma*
*Opposes: Iron Fang Consortium*

Travel through the treacherous Warrens, navigating rival factions to escort a child to the safety of the Adventurers Guild. Contact: Officer Kael, Warrens District.

title: Yaulderna's Conundrum
body:
**Wizards Tower — Yaulderna's Conundrum**
*Tier: Epic | Expires: TBD | Reward: 200 EC + 100 Kharma + 10 LP*
*Opposes: None*

Assist Archmage Yaulderna Silverstreak in deciphering an arcane artifact, said to hold the key to unlocking the city's hidden potential. Meet Archmage Yaulderna at the Wizards Tower's Grand Library. The artifact is believed to reside within the Outer Wall's Forgotten Ruins. Proceed with caution as the ruins are rumored to be haunted by arcane spirits.

*Contact: Archmage Yaulderna Silverstreak, Wizards Tower's Grand Library*

title: Missing Pages
body:
**Glass Sigil — Missing Pages**
*Tier: local | Expires: TBD | Reward: 50 EC + 10 Kharma*
*Opposes: None*

A member of the Glass Sigil has gone missing, and they were last seen in the Markets Infinite district. The missing individual, Senior Archivist Pell, has taken a rare and valuable set of ancient arcane scrolls with them. Your mission, should you choose to accept it, is to locate Pell and retrieve the scrolls.

*Contact: Mari Fen, Adventurers Guild*

title: Feathers of the Pipeline
body:
**Argent Blades — Feathers of the Pipeline**
*Tier: Local | Expires: 5 days | Reward: 30 EC + 10 Kharma*
*Opposes: None*

*Contact: Mari Fen, Adventurers Guild*

Lady Cerys Valemont of the Argent Blades is looking to purchase a rare item – the feathers of a Pipeline Owlin. She believes they have the potential to bolster her armor enchantments in the arena. The last known collector, a certain Gideon Ravenwood, is rumored to have recently acquired some. Find and retrieve the feathers from Ravenwood's hideout in the Outer Wall. S'kree, your unique status as a Pipeline Owlin makes you the perfect candidate for this task. Prove your worth to the Sky Commanders and secure a hefty reward.

title: Silent Shadows
body:
**Serpent Choir — Silent Shadows**
*Tier: Investigation | Expires: TBD | Reward: 100 EC + 100 Kharma*
*Opposes: None*

In the heart of the Sanctum Quarter, whispers of unholy origins have begun to haunt the faithful. As a seasoned adventurer, you are tasked with uncovering the source of these whispers. If left unchecked, they may threaten faith in the Serpent Choir and disrupt the delicate balance of power in the Undercity.

*Contact: High Apostle Yzura, Sanctum Quarter*

title: The Shrouded Heist
body:
**Iron Fang Consortium — The Shrouded Heist**
*Tier: High-stakes | Expires: TBD | Reward: 150 EC + 50 Kharma + 10 LP*
*Opposes: Wardens of Ash*

An elite relic, long rumored to be hidden within the Wardens of Ash's stronghold, has surfaced. The Iron Fang Consortium seeks a daring adventurer to infiltrate the Outer Wall's fortress, locate the artifact, and retrieve it for a handsome reward.

*Contact: The Widow, Obsidian Lotus headquarters, Markets Infinite*

title: Archivist's Asset
body:
**Glass Sigil — Archivist's Asset**
*Tier: Escort | Expires: TBD | Reward: 120 EC + 100 Kharma*
*Opposes: Obsidian Lotus*

A valuable tome has been stolen from the Glass Sigil, and retrieving it requires navigating the dangerous world of the city's underbelly. Mari Fen needs a sturdy team to escort the senior archivist, Pell, into the Warrens, where the stolen tome is believed to be held by the Obsidian Lotus.

*Contact: Mari Fen, Adventurers Guild*

title: The Face of Ironfoot
body:
**Iron Fang Consortium — The Face of Ironfoot**
*Tier: investigation | Expires: 7 days | Reward: 200 EC + a permanent membership discount*
*Opposes: None*

A doppelganger has been spotted walking the Undercity, wearing the late Grover Ironfoot's face. This deceitful mimicry is a slap in the face to our honor and the memory of our fallen comrade. We need answers.

If you're not afraid of the shadows, meet Fiona "Mudfoot" Muckledown at the Dusk Tavern, located in the Heart of the Undercity. She's been witness to this disturbing impersonation and may have valuable information. Your mission: find and identify the impersonator.

*Contact: Fiona "Mudfoot" Muckledown, Dusk Tavern, Heart of the Undercity*

title: The Arcane Showdown
body:
**Wizards Tower — The Arcane Showdown**
*Tier: Inter-Guild | Expires: TBD | Reward: 500 EC + 100 Kharma*
*Opposes: None*

Join the Wizards Tower for a city-wide competition against rival guilds in a series of arcane challenges! Prove your skill and secure valuable resources and reputation as you vie for the title of the city's foremost arcane force.

*Contact: Senior Archivist Pell, Wizards Tower*

title: The Warrens' Wildling
body:
**Patchwork Saints — The Warrens' Wildling**
*Tier: Escort | Expires: TBD | Reward: 100 EC + 75 Kharma*
*Opposes: Obsidian Lotus*

A dangerous criminal, known as the Warrens' Wildling, is on the loose in the labyrinthine Warrens district, and the Patchwork Saints need reinforcements to capture them before they can cause more chaos. Your target is a notorious smuggler rumored to be working closely with the Obsidian Lotus.

*Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Wardens of Ash Headquarters, Sanctum Quarter*

title: Guild Game
body:
**Wizards Tower — Guild Game**
*Tier: High-stakes | Expires: TBD | Reward: 200 EC + 50 Kharma*
*Opposes: Tower Authority*

Compete in a series of arcane challenges set by the Wizards Tower to secure valuable resources and reputation in this year's Guild Game. The winner will be granted access to ancient texts and forbidden spells. The competition is fierce, and you'll need to outwit the Tower Authority, who are also participating.

*Contact: Senior Archivist Pell, Guild Spires*

title: The Disappeared Knight
body:
**Wardens of Ash — The Disappeared Knight**
*Tier: Investigation | Expires: TBD | Reward: 50 EC + 75 Kharma*
*Opposes: None*

Investigate the sudden disappearance of Sir Gavric Veldur, a respected Knight of the Ash, in the heart of Grand Forum. Uncover the cause behind his sudden vanishing and the ominous rumors that have been circulating about a mysterious organization infiltrating the city.

Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Sanctum Quarter.

title: The Suspicious Spire
body:
**Wardens of Ash — The Suspicious Spire**
*Tier: Local | Expires: TBD | Reward: 30 EC*
*Opposes: None*

The Wardens suspect that a rift might have opened in the Outer Wall, near the Spire of Hope. You're to sweep the area, investigate, and report back with any findings.

*Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Wardens' Barracks*

title: The Heated Trade
body:
**Iron Fang Consortium — The Heated Trade**
*Tier: Major | Expires: TBD | Reward: 150 EC + 25 Kharma*
*Opposes: Obsidian Lotus*

A rare artifact has surfaced on the black market, and the Iron Fang Consortium needs a reliable adventurer to secure its acquisition. Meet with Serrik Dhal at the Iron Fang Consortium office in the Outer Wall for further instructions.

*Contact: Serrik Dhal, Outer Wall - Iron Fang Consortium Office*

title: The Masked Intruder
reward: 500 EC + Access to the Ironheart-Thrain's private files
body:
**Tower Authority — The Masked Intruder**
*Tier: investigation | Expires: Open-ended | Reward: 500 EC + Access to the Ironheart-Thrain's private files*
*Opposes: None*

A doppelganger has been sighted in the Undercity, impersonating the late Zephyrus Ironheart-Thrain, a prominent member of the Tower Authority. Last seen in the Black Market district, the imposter was overheard discussing sensitive Tower matters with a shady broker. Identifying and apprehending this individual is of utmost importance.

*Contact: Elara Ironheart, Tower Authority Headquarters*

title: The Leaden Crown's Test
body:
**Wardens of Ash — The Leaden Crown's Test**
*Tier: Escort | Expires: 21 Days | Reward: 80 EC + 50 Kharma*
*Opposes: None*

Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Sanctum Quarter

Captain Havel Korin of the Wardens of Ash seeks the skilled Monk, Lammis. The Wardens have received reports of a growing disturbance in the Outer Wall. They require Lammis's unique abilities to guide a team through the area and secure it against potential threats. Your assistance would be invaluable, as the Warrior of the Leaden Crown, in preserving the peace of the Undercity.

title: The Warrens' Despair
body:
**Iron Fang Consortium — The Warrens' Despair**
*Tier: Rift | Expires: TBD | Reward: 500 EC + 100 Kharma*
*Opposes: Serpent Choir*

A terrifying rift has torn open in the Warrens, growing larger each day. Rumors suggest it's being fed by dark energies from a nearby Serpent Choir outpost. The Iron Fang Consortium needs a team of brave adventurers to seal this rift and protect the city.

*Contact: Zarik, Outer Wall - West Gate*

title: Missing Messenger
body:
**Patchwork Saints — Missing Messenger**
*Tier: local | Expires: TBD | Reward: 50 EC*
*Opposes: None*

A courier from the Warrens' Patchwork Saints district has gone missing. The last known location was near the Outer Wall. You're tasked with finding the lost messenger and returning any sensitive documents they may have been carrying.

*Contact: Varris, The Warrens (Gang Hideout)*

title: Fate's Fortune
body:
**Adventurers Guild — Fate's Fortune**
*Tier: Rift | Expires: TBD | Reward: 120 EC + 100 Kharma*
*Opposes: None*

A series of mysterious Rifts have been appearing at the edge of the Outer Wall, threatening to consume the city. Join the Adventurers Guild in investigating these occurrences, rumored to be the work of a powerful being. Meet with Mari Fen at the Adventurers Guild in Guild Spires to receive your orders.

*Contact: Mari Fen, Adventurers Guild, Guild Spires*

title: The Hidden Forge
body:
**Iron Fang Consortium — The Hidden Forge**
*Tier: Investigation | Expires: TBD | Reward: 75 EC + 2 Legend Points*
*Opposes: None*

*Contact: Vaelon, Sanctum Quarter*

Lammis, your prowess has not gone unnoticed by the Iron Fang Consortium. We've received a lead on a rare artifact rumored to enhance the power of psionic warriors like yourself. The Hidden Forge, as it's called, is said to be hidden deep within the Warrens. We need someone we can trust to retrieve it without causing a fuss. Your reputation as a Warrior of the Leaden Crown makes you the ideal candidate for this mission. Speak with Vaelon in the Sanctum Quarter when you're ready to accept this challenge. Good luck, and may fortune smile upon you.

title: Pride of the Undercity
body:
**Argent Blades — Pride of the Undercity**
*Tier: Inter-Guild | Expires: TBD | Reward: 100 EC + 100 Kharma*
*Opposes: None*

Rally the city's bravest and most skilled warriors to assemble a formidable team to represent the Undercity in an inter-city gladiatorial tournament hosted by Lady Cerys Valemont herself. Prove your mettle and bring honor to the city, with the potential for increased fame and substantial rewards for victories.

*Contact: Argent Blades' Recruitment Officer, Grand Forum*

title: Tower's Troubles
body:
**Tower Authority — Tower's Troubles**
*Tier: Tower | Expires: 190 days | Reward: 1000 EC + 200 Kharma*
*Opposes: None*

A longstanding feud between city factions threatens to ignite a devastating conflict within the Undercity. The Tower Authority needs a skilled team to broker a truce, averting a potential city-wide catastrophe.

*Contact: Director Myra Kess, Grand Forum*

title: The Warrens' Rending Veil
body:
**Iron Fang Consortium — The Warrens' Rending Veil**
*Tier: Rift | Expires: TBD | Reward: 250 EC + 75 Kharma*
*Opposes: Serpent Choir*

A rift has grown in the Warrens, a tear that has been worsening for days. The Iron Fang Consortium seeks skilled adventurers to investigate and seal this threat to the city.

*Contact: Zael Azzur, Outer Wall Watchtower*

title: The Veil of Whispering Shadows
body:
**Glass Sigil — The Veil of Whispering Shadows**
*Tier: Inter-Guild | Expires: TBD | Reward: 500 EC + 50 Kharma*
*Opposes: None*

The Glass Sigil seeks to unravel the secrets of a powerful arcane artifact hidden within the Warrens, a task that could redefine the Wizards Tower's influence. Senior Archivist Pell has requested your assistance to retrieve this artifact from the clutches of the Obsidian Lotus.

*Contact: Senior Archivist Pell, Guild Spires*

title: Sweep of the Twisting Vale
body:
**Wardens of Ash — Sweep of the Twisting Vale**
*Tier: Local | Expires: TBD | Reward: 50 EC + 50 Kharma*
*Opposes: None*

Investigate a series of unsettling incidents along the Twisting Vale, a remote section of the Warrens. Recent reports suggest a growing presence of dangerous creatures, which could threaten local residents. Meet with Captain Havel Korin at the Wardens' Outpost to discuss the situation and begin your patrol.

*Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Wardens' Outpost, The Warrens*

title: The Forgotten Veil Unraveled
body:
**Wizards Tower — The Forgotten Veil Unraveled**
*Tier: Local | Expires: TBD | Reward: 100 EC + 50 Kharma*
*Opposes: None*

Contact: Senior Archivist Pell, Wizards Tower

Eleanor Reed, your exceptional understanding of arcane energies has drawn the attention of the Wizards Tower. Senior Archivist Pell requires your assistance in unraveling a peculiar occurrence in the Warrens. It is believed that a hidden veil between dimensions has formed, allowing strange energy to seep into our realm. Your Ward of Stability may be the key to stabilizing this rift before it destabilizes the entire city. Investigate the origin of this veil and devise a solution to close it. Time is of the essence, for it is unclear what may be attracted to this rift.

title: Lost Protector
body:
**Wardens of Ash — Lost Protector**
*Tier: local | Expires: TBD | Reward: 50 EC + 50 Kharma*
*Opposes: None*

A prominent protector in the Warrens, known as "Bearclaw," has gone missing. The Wardens suspect foul play and seek an experienced adventurer to investigate the matter discreetly.

*Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Sanctum Quarter*

title: The Shattered Spire
body:
**Wizards Tower — The Shattered Spire**
*Tier: Epic | Expires: TBD | Reward: 1000 EC + 100 Kharma + 5 LP*
*Opposes: Serpent Choir*

The Wizards Tower's archives have been breached by the Serpent Choir, seeking to reclaim lost divine artifacts. Infiltrate their stronghold in the Outer Wall and retrieve these artifacts to secure the Tower's power.

*Contact: Senior Archivist Pell, Wizards Tower*

title: The Masked Usurper
reward: 50 EC + a lead on the doppelganger's whereabouts
body:
**Argent Blades — The Masked Usurper**
*Tier: investigation | Expires: TBD | Reward: 50 EC + a lead on the doppelganger's whereabouts*
*Opposes: None*

In the heart of the Undercity's Slaughter's Row, a man claimed to be Alaric Stonemason has been spotted, his face a chilling resemblance to the deceased Argent Blades member. This imposter has been stirring up trouble, sowing discord among the factions. The Argent Blades need answers.

*Contact: Elara Ironthorn, the Argent Blades' Quartermaster, located within the Argent Blades' Citadel on Iron Street.*

Objective: Unmask the usurper and bring him to justice. Investigate the sightings in Slaughter's Row, question witnesses, and follow the trail to the doppelganger's hiding place. The fate of Alaric Stonemason and the Argent Blades rests in your hands.

title: A Field Long Overdue
body:
**Patchwork Saints — A Field Long Overdue**
*Tier: Local | Expires: TBD | Reward: 75 EC + 50 Kharma*
*Opposes: None*

*Contact: Elder Lirien, The Warrens (near the Leaking Flask)*

Lammis, your reputation as a formidable force in the Undercity has reached the ears of Elder Lirien, the oldest guardian of the Warrens. It seems an old enemy from your farming days has resurfaced, causing trouble in the Warrens. Elder Lirien requests your aid in apprehending this individual and bringing them to justice. This is a matter of personal honor for you, and the Warrens would be most grateful for your assistance.

title: The Missing Scholar
body:
**Glass Sigil — The Missing Scholar**
*Tier: Local | Expires: TBD | Reward: 50 EC + 10 Kharma*
*Opposes: None*

A prominent scholar from the Glass Sigil has gone missing, and his valuable research is feared lost within the labyrinthine Warrens. Your task is to locate him and return him to safety.

*Contact: Senior Archivist Pell, Guild Spires*

title: The Warrens' Veiled Tomb
body:
**Wardens of Ash — The Warrens' Veiled Tomb**
*Tier: rift | Expires: TBD | Reward: 120 EC + 75 Kharma*
*Opposes: None*

Deep within the Warrens, a long-forgotten vault has been disturbed, releasing an ancient evil. The Wardens of Ash seek an adventurer to delve into the Veiled Tomb and retrieve the corrupted artifact before it wreaks havoc on the city.

Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Sanctum Quarter.

title: The Missing Relics of the Patchwork Saints
body:
**Adventurers Guild — The Missing Relics of the Patchwork Saints**
*Tier: Escort | Expires: TBD | Reward: 250 EC + 50 Kharma*
*Opposes: Patchwork Saints, Iron Fang Consortium*

Recover three stolen relics from the Patchwork Saints and return them to the Iron Fang Consortium for a significant bounty. Be cautious, as the Patchwork Saints will not take kindly to this breach of trust.

Contact: Mari Fen, Adventurers Guild (Guild Spires)

title: Triumph of Champions
body:
**Argent Blades — Triumph of Champions**
*Tier: Escort | Expires: TBD | Reward: 100 EC + 50 Kharma*
*Opposes: None*

Embark on a series of public duels at the Grand Forum, pitting you against three champions from rival factions to prove your worth and gain the glory of Lady Cerys Valemont.

*Contact: Duel Master Zephyr, Grand Forum*

title: Feathers of a Legend
body:
**Glass Sigil — Feathers of a Legend**
*Tier: Escort | Expires: 21 days | Reward: 200 EC + 50 Kharma*
*Opposes: None*

*Contact: Eir Velan, Guild of Ashen Scrolls, Sanctum Quarter*

The Guild of Ashen Scrolls has received word of a rare opportunity. A collector seeks to acquire more of the prized feathers of the Pipeline Owlin, S'kree. They believe that S'kree's feathers may hold the key to unlocking secrets about your species.

Your mission, if you choose to accept it, is to escort a caravan led by Eir Velan through the Warrens to the Outer Wall. Here, they will rendezvous with a representative of the collector. Your objective is to deliver the feathers safely.

This is a chance for you to potentially learn more about your kind and earn a significant reward. The fate of the Pipeline Owlin's feathers lies in your hands.

title: The Test of Faith
body:
**Serpent Choir — The Test of Faith**
*Tier: Epic | Expires: TBD | Reward: 1000 EC + 200 Kharma*
*Opposes: Obsidian Lotus*

A sacred artifact has been stolen from the Serpent Choir by the Obsidian Lotus. Prove your loyalty and faith by reclaiming it.

*Contact: High Apostle Yzura, Sanctum Quarter*

title: The Protected Convoy
body:
**Wardens of Ash — The Protected Convoy**
*Tier: Escort | Expires: TBD | Reward: 250 EC + 100 Kharma*
*Opposes: Obsidian Lotus*

A convoy of valuable supplies for the Sanctum Quarter's hospital is being transported through the treacherous Outer Wall territory. The Wardens of Ash need a reliable team to escort the convoy safely to its destination. Meet Captain Havel Korin at the Watchtower Gate for further instructions.

*Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Watchtower Gate, Sanctum Quarter*

title: The Lost Runner
body:
**Patchwork Saints — The Lost Runner**
*Tier: Local | Expires: TBD | Reward: 100 EC + 50 Kharma*
*Opposes: None*

A messenger carrying sensitive information for the Patchwork Saints has gone missing in the Warrens. Your task is to locate the missing runner and retrieve the lost documents.

Contact: Aven, The Warrens' Crossroads

title: Shattered Alliances
body:
**Glass Sigil — Shattered Alliances**
*Tier: Inter-guild | Expires: TBD | Reward: 150 EC + 100 Kharma*
*Opposes: Obsidian Lotus*

The Black Market has been a hotbed of tension between our guilds as of late. A spy within the ranks of the Obsidian Lotus has been feeding us intel, but we suspect they are about to turn the tables. We need you to infiltrate their inner circle and uncover their next move. Meet with Senior Archivist Pell at the Grand Forum to receive your orders.

title: The Prophecy of the Last Chance
body:
**Glass Sigil — The Prophecy of the Last Chance**
*Tier: Epic | Expires: TBD | Reward: 1000 EC + 500 Kharma*
*Opposes: None*

Travel to the Wizards Tower and decipher an ancient prophecy hidden within the archives to predict the city's future. The fate of the Undercity may rest in your hands.

Contact: Senior Archivist Pell, Wizards Tower Archive

title: City Defense Drill
body:
**Wardens of Ash — City Defense Drill**
*Tier: Escort | Expires: TBD | Reward: 75 EC + meal voucher*
*Opposes: None*

Join Captain Havel Korin and the Wardens of Ash for an urgent city defense exercise at the Outer Wall. We need experienced adventurers to help secure key locations against simulated attacks from the Iron Fang Consortium.

*Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Grand Forum*

title: The Gilded Gamble
body:
**Obsidian Lotus — The Gilded Gamble**
*Tier: Major | Expires: TBD | Reward: 500 EC + 100 Kharma*
*Opposes: Iron Fang Consortium*

A lucrative black market deal awaits in the Guild Spires, but tread carefully, for the Iron Fang Consortium lurks in the shadows. The Widow has a job for you at the Crossroads Tavern.

*Contact: The Widow, Crossroads Tavern, Guild Spires*

title: Warrens Ward
body:
**Patchwork Saints — Warrens Ward**
*Tier: Local | Expires: TBD | Reward: 50 EC + 50 Kharma*
*Opposes: Obsidian Lotus*

The Patchwork Saints are in need of able hands to secure the Warren's district of "Needle's Eye." A spike in Obsidian Lotus activity has left the district vulnerable. Mari Fen of the Adventurers Guild seeks help to safeguard the area and quell their influence.

*Contact: Mari Fen, Adventurers Guild Spire*

title: A Shadow Over Sanctum Quarter
body:
**Wardens of Ash — A Shadow Over Sanctum Quarter**
*Tier: Local | Expires: TBD | Reward: 50 EC + 20 Kharma*
*Opposes: None*

Following a recent rise in suspicious activity, it appears a group of thieves are attempting to infiltrate Sanctum Quarter. Your mission is to sweep through the district, locating and securing any signs of intrusion. Report any leads to Captain Havel Korin at the Wardens of Ash Headquarters.

*Contact: Captain Havel Korin, Wardens of Ash Headquarters*

title: Celestial Debt
body:
**Argent Blades — Celestial Debt**
*Tier: Escort | Expires: 21 days | Reward: 150 EC + 50 Kharma*
*Opposes: Serpent Choir*

A Lady Cerys Valemont has a request for you, Boxxo. Meet her at the Grand Forum, at the fountain of the fallen heroes, at dusk. She seeks an escort to the Sanctum Quarter. A Serpent Choir has taken an interest in an artifact that once belonged to her family, and she needs it returned. Your unique abilities make you an ideal candidate for this task. Be prepared, Boxxo, your past actions have caught up with you, and this mission will test your loyalties.

title: The Markets' Rune Weave
body:
**Wizards Tower — The Markets' Rune Weave**
*Tier: Escort | Expires: TBD | Reward: 150 EC + 100 Kharma*
*Opposes: None*

Archmage Yaulderna Silverstreak requests your presence for an arcane ritual at the heart of Markets Infinite. The enchantment will fortify the city's defenses, ensuring our continued prosperity. Escort the Archmage and her entourage through the bustling marketplace to the Wizards Tower.

*Contact: Archmage Yaulderna Silverstreak, Wizards Tower*

title: Lost Dwarven Relics
body:
**Iron Fang Consortium — Lost Dwarven Relics**
*Tier: Standard | Expires: 21 Days | Reward: 150 EC + 50 Kharma*
*Opposes: None*

Contact: Zorick Ironbeard, Sanctum Quarter

Legendary Dwarf warrior Ragard Gronhammer, we have reason to believe that an ancient cache of lost Dwarven artifacts lies buried deep within the Warrens. As a champion of your people, we seek your expertise to recover these relics and secure them for the Iron Fang Consortium. Success would not only bring immense profit but also restore honor to our shared heritage.
